34 #define DECLARE_SOA_METADATA() \
35  template <typename T> \
36  struct MetadataTrait { \
37  using metadata = std::void_t<T>; \
38  };

40 namespace o2::aod
41 {
42 DECLARE_SOA_METADATA();
43 }

45 namespace o2::soa
46 {
47 
48 struct Binding {
49  void const* ptr = nullptr;
50  size_t hash = 0;
51 
52  template <typename T>
53  void bind(T const* table)
54  {
55  ptr = table;
56  hash = o2::framework::TypeIdHelpers::uniqueId<T>();
57  }
58 
59  template <typename T>
60  T const* get() const
61  {
62  if (hash == o2::framework::TypeIdHelpers::uniqueId<T>()) {
63  return static_cast<T const*>(ptr);
64  }
65  return nullptr;
66  }
67 };
68 
69 void accessingInvalidIndexFor(const char* getter);
70 void dereferenceWithWrongType();
71 void missingFilterDeclaration(int hash, int ai);
72 
73 template <typename... C>
74 auto createFieldsFromColumns(framework::pack<C...>)
75 {
76  return std::vector<std::shared_ptr<arrow::Field>>{C::asArrowField()...};
77 }
78 
79 using SelectionVector = std::vector<int64_t>;
80 
81 template <typename, typename = void>
82 inline constexpr bool is_index_column_v = false;
83 
84 template <typename T>
85 inline constexpr bool is_index_column_v<T, std::void_t<decltype(sizeof(typename T::binding_t))>> = true;
86 
87 template <typename, typename = void>
88 inline constexpr bool is_type_with_originals_v = false;
89 
90 template <typename T>
91 inline constexpr bool is_type_with_originals_v<T, std::void_t<decltype(sizeof(typename T::originals))>> = true;
92 
93 template <typename T, typename = void>
94 inline constexpr bool is_type_with_parent_v = false;
95 
96 template <typename T>
97 inline constexpr bool is_type_with_parent_v<T, std::void_t<decltype(sizeof(typename T::parent_t))>> = true;
98 
99 template <typename, typename = void>
100 inline constexpr bool is_type_with_metadata_v = false;
101 
102 template <typename T>
103 inline constexpr bool is_type_with_metadata_v<T, std::void_t<decltype(sizeof(typename T::metadata))>> = true;
104 
105 template <typename, typename = void>
106 inline constexpr bool is_type_with_binding_v = false;
107 
108 template <typename T>
109 inline constexpr bool is_type_with_binding_v<T, std::void_t<decltype(sizeof(typename T::binding_t))>> = true;
110 
111 template <typename, typename = void>
112 inline constexpr bool is_type_spawnable_v = false;
113 
114 template <typename T>
115 inline constexpr bool is_type_spawnable_v<T, std::void_t<decltype(sizeof(typename T::spawnable_t))>> = true;
116 
117 template <typename, typename = void>
118 inline constexpr bool is_soa_extension_table_v = false;
119 
120 template <typename T>
121 inline constexpr bool is_soa_extension_table_v<T, std::void_t<decltype(sizeof(typename T::expression_pack_t))>> = true;
122 
123 template <typename T, typename = void>
124 inline constexpr bool is_index_table_v = false;
125 
126 template <typename T>
127 inline constexpr bool is_index_table_v<T, std::void_t<decltype(sizeof(typename T::indexing_t))>> = true;
128 
129 template <typename, typename = void>
130 inline constexpr bool is_self_index_column_v = false;
131 
132 template <typename T>
133 inline constexpr bool is_self_index_column_v<T, std::void_t<decltype(sizeof(typename T::self_index_t))>> = true;
134 
135 template <typename, typename = void>
136 inline constexpr bool is_with_base_table_v = false;
137 
138 template <typename T>
139 inline constexpr bool is_with_base_table_v<T, std::void_t<decltype(sizeof(typename T::base_table_t))>> = true;
140 
141 template <typename B, typename E>
142 struct EquivalentIndex {
143  constexpr static bool value = false;
144 };
145 
146 template <typename B, typename E>
147 constexpr bool is_index_equivalent_v = EquivalentIndex<B, E>::value || EquivalentIndex<E, B>::value;
148 
149 template <typename T, typename TLambda>
150 void call_if_has_originals(TLambda&& lambda)
151 {
152  if constexpr (is_type_with_originals_v<T>) {
153  lambda(static_cast<T*>(nullptr));
154  }
155 }
156 
157 template <typename T, typename TLambda>
158 void call_if_has_not_originals(TLambda&& lambda)
159 {
160  if constexpr (!is_type_with_originals_v<T>) {
161  lambda(static_cast<T*>(nullptr));
162  }
163 }
164 
165 template <typename H, typename... T>
166 constexpr auto make_originals_from_type()
167 {
168  using decayed = std::decay_t<H>;
169  if constexpr (sizeof...(T) == 0) {
170  if constexpr (is_type_with_originals_v<decayed>) {
171  return typename decayed::originals{};
172  } else if constexpr (is_type_with_originals_v<typename decayed::table_t>) {
173  return typename decayed::table_t::originals{};
174  } else if constexpr (is_type_with_parent_v<decayed>) {
175  return make_originals_from_type<typename decayed::parent_t>();
176  } else {
177  return framework::pack<decayed>{};
178  }
179  } else if constexpr (is_type_with_originals_v<decayed>) {
180  return framework::concatenate_pack(typename decayed::originals{}, make_originals_from_type<T...>());
181  } else if constexpr (is_type_with_originals_v<typename decayed::table_t>) {
182  return framework::concatenate_pack(typename decayed::table_t::originals{}, make_originals_from_type<T...>());
183  } else {
184  return framework::concatenate_pack(framework::pack<decayed>{}, make_originals_from_type<T...>());
185  }
186 }
187 
188 template <typename... T>
189 constexpr auto make_originals_from_type(framework::pack<T...>)
190 {
191  return make_originals_from_type<T...>();
192 }
193 
197 struct Chunked {
198  constexpr static bool chunked = true;
199 };
200 
203 struct Flat {
204  constexpr static bool chunked = false;
205 };
206 
208 template <typename T>
209 struct unwrap {
210  using type = T;
211 };
212 
213 template <typename T>
214 struct unwrap<std::vector<T>> {
215  using type = T;
216 };
217 
218 template <>
219 struct unwrap<bool> {
220  using type = char;
221 };
222 
223 template <typename T>
224 using unwrap_t = typename unwrap<T>::type;
225 
230 template <typename T, typename ChunkingPolicy = Chunked>
231 class ColumnIterator : ChunkingPolicy
232 {
233  static constexpr char SCALE_FACTOR = std::is_same_v<std::decay_t<T>, bool> ? 3 : 0;
234 
235  public:
240  ColumnIterator(arrow::ChunkedArray const* column)
241  : mColumn{column},
242  mCurrent{nullptr},
243  mCurrentPos{nullptr},
244  mLast{nullptr},
245  mFirstIndex{0},
246  mCurrentChunk{0},
247  mOffset{0}
248  {
249  auto array = getCurrentArray();
250  mCurrent = reinterpret_cast<unwrap_t<T> const*>(array->values()->data()) + (mOffset >> SCALE_FACTOR);
251  mLast = mCurrent + array->length();
252  }
253 
254  ColumnIterator() = default;
255  ColumnIterator(ColumnIterator<T, ChunkingPolicy> const&) = default;
256  ColumnIterator<T, ChunkingPolicy>& operator=(ColumnIterator<T, ChunkingPolicy> const&) = default;
257 
258  ColumnIterator(ColumnIterator<T, ChunkingPolicy>&&) = default;
259  ColumnIterator<T, ChunkingPolicy>& operator=(ColumnIterator<T, ChunkingPolicy>&&) = default;
260 
262  void nextChunk() const
263  {
264  auto previousArray = getCurrentArray();
265  mFirstIndex += previousArray->length();
266 
267  mCurrentChunk++;
268  auto array = getCurrentArray();
269  mCurrent = reinterpret_cast<unwrap_t<T> const*>(array->values()->data()) + (mOffset >> SCALE_FACTOR) - (mFirstIndex >> SCALE_FACTOR);
270  mLast = mCurrent + array->length() + (mFirstIndex >> SCALE_FACTOR);
271  }
272 
273  void prevChunk() const
274  {
275  auto previousArray = getCurrentArray();
276  mFirstIndex -= previousArray->length();
277 
278  mCurrentChunk--;
279  auto array = getCurrentArray();
280  mCurrent = reinterpret_cast<unwrap_t<T> const*>(array->values()->data()) + (mOffset >> SCALE_FACTOR) - (mFirstIndex >> SCALE_FACTOR);
281  mLast = mCurrent + array->length() + (mFirstIndex >> SCALE_FACTOR);
282  }
283 
284  void moveToChunk(int chunk)
285  {
286  if (mCurrentChunk < chunk) {
287  while (mCurrentChunk != chunk) {
288  nextChunk();
289  }
290  } else {
291  while (mCurrentChunk != chunk) {
292  prevChunk();
293  }
294  }
295  }
296 
298  void moveToEnd()
299  {
300  mCurrentChunk = mColumn->num_chunks() - 1;
301  auto array = getCurrentArray();
302  mFirstIndex = mColumn->length() - array->length();
303  mCurrent = reinterpret_cast<unwrap_t<T> const*>(array->values()->data()) + (mOffset >> SCALE_FACTOR) - (mFirstIndex >> SCALE_FACTOR);
304  mLast = mCurrent + array->length() + (mFirstIndex >> SCALE_FACTOR);
305  }
306 
307  decltype(auto) operator*() const
308  {
309  if constexpr (ChunkingPolicy::chunked) {
310  if constexpr (std::is_same_v<arrow_array_for_t<T>, arrow::ListArray>) {
311  auto list = std::static_pointer_cast<arrow::ListArray>(mColumn->chunk(mCurrentChunk));
312  if (O2_BUILTIN_UNLIKELY(*mCurrentPos - mFirstIndex >= list->length())) {
313  nextChunk();
314  }
315  } else {
316  if (O2_BUILTIN_UNLIKELY(((mCurrent + (*mCurrentPos >> SCALE_FACTOR)) >= mLast))) {
317  nextChunk();
318  }
319  }
320  }
321  if constexpr (std::is_same_v<bool, std::decay_t<T>>) {
322  // FIXME: check if shifting the masked bit to the first position is better than != 0
323  return (*(mCurrent - (mOffset >> SCALE_FACTOR) + ((*mCurrentPos + mOffset) >> SCALE_FACTOR)) & (1 << ((*mCurrentPos + mOffset) & 0x7))) != 0;
324  } else if constexpr (std::is_same_v<arrow_array_for_t<T>, arrow::ListArray>) {
325  auto list = std::static_pointer_cast<arrow::ListArray>(mColumn->chunk(mCurrentChunk));
326  auto offset = list->value_offset(*mCurrentPos - mFirstIndex);
327  auto length = list->value_length(*mCurrentPos - mFirstIndex);
328  return gsl::span{mCurrent + mFirstIndex + offset, mCurrent + mFirstIndex + (offset + length)};
329  } else {
330  return *(mCurrent + (*mCurrentPos >> SCALE_FACTOR));
331  }
332  }
333 
334  // Move to the chunk which containts element pos
335  ColumnIterator<T>& moveToPos()
336  {
337  // If we get outside range of the current chunk, go to the next.
338  if constexpr (ChunkingPolicy::chunked) {
339  while (O2_BUILTIN_UNLIKELY((mCurrent + (*mCurrentPos >> SCALE_FACTOR)) >= mLast)) {
340  nextChunk();
341  }
342  }
343  return *this;
344  }
345 
346  // Move to the chunk which containts element pos
347  ColumnIterator<T>& checkNextChunk()
348  {
349  if constexpr (ChunkingPolicy::chunked) {
350  if (O2_BUILTIN_LIKELY((mCurrent + (*mCurrentPos >> SCALE_FACTOR)) <= mLast)) {
351  return *this;
352  }
353  nextChunk();
354  }
355  return *this;
356  }
357 
358  mutable unwrap_t<T> const* mCurrent;
359  int64_t const* mCurrentPos;
360  mutable unwrap_t<T> const* mLast;
361  arrow::ChunkedArray const* mColumn;
362  mutable int mFirstIndex;
363  mutable int mCurrentChunk;
364  mutable int mOffset;
365 
366  private:
368  auto getCurrentArray() const
369  {
370  std::shared_ptr<arrow::Array> chunkToUse = mColumn->chunk(mCurrentChunk);
371  mOffset = chunkToUse->offset();
372  if constexpr (std::is_same_v<arrow_array_for_t<T>, arrow::FixedSizeListArray>) {
373  chunkToUse = std::dynamic_pointer_cast<arrow::FixedSizeListArray>(chunkToUse)->values();
374  return std::static_pointer_cast<arrow_array_for_t<value_for_t<T>>>(chunkToUse);
375  } else if constexpr (std::is_same_v<arrow_array_for_t<T>, arrow::ListArray>) {
376  chunkToUse = std::dynamic_pointer_cast<arrow::ListArray>(chunkToUse)->values();
377  mOffset = chunkToUse->offset();
378  return std::static_pointer_cast<arrow_array_for_t<value_for_t<T>>>(chunkToUse);
379  } else {
380  return std::static_pointer_cast<arrow_array_for_t<T>>(chunkToUse);
381  }
382  }
383 };
384 
385 template <typename T, typename INHERIT>
386 struct Column {
387  using inherited_t = INHERIT;
388  Column(ColumnIterator<T> const& it)
389  : mColumnIterator{it}
390  {
391  }
392 
393  Column() = default;
394  Column(Column const&) = default;
395  Column& operator=(Column const&) = default;
396 
397  Column(Column&&) = default;
398  Column& operator=(Column&&) = default;
399 
400  using persistent = std::true_type;
401  using type = T;
402  static constexpr const char* const& columnLabel() { return INHERIT::mLabel; }
403  ColumnIterator<T> const& getIterator() const
404  {
405  return mColumnIterator;
406  }
407 
408  static auto asArrowField()
409  {
410  return std::make_shared<arrow::Field>(inherited_t::mLabel, framework::expressions::concreteArrowType(framework::expressions::selectArrowType<type>()));
411  }
412 
415  ColumnIterator<T> mColumnIterator;
416 };
417 
420 template <typename F, typename INHERIT>
421 struct DynamicColumn {
422  using inherited_t = INHERIT;
423 
424  using persistent = std::false_type;
425  static constexpr const char* const& columnLabel() { return INHERIT::mLabel; }
426 };
427 
428 template <typename INHERIT>
429 struct IndexColumn {
430  using inherited_t = INHERIT;
431 
432  using persistent = std::false_type;
433  static constexpr const char* const& columnLabel() { return INHERIT::mLabel; }
434 };
435 
436 template <typename INHERIT>
437 struct MarkerColumn {
438  using inherited_t = INHERIT;
439 
440  using persistent = std::false_type;
441  static constexpr const char* const& columnLabel() { return INHERIT::mLabel; }
442 };
443 
444 template <size_t M = 0>
445 struct Marker : o2::soa::MarkerColumn<Marker<M>> {
446  using type = size_t;
447  using base = o2::soa::MarkerColumn<Marker<M>>;
448  constexpr inline static auto value = M;
449 
450  Marker() = default;
451  Marker(Marker const&) = default;
452  Marker(Marker&&) = default;
453 
454  Marker& operator=(Marker const&) = default;
455  Marker& operator=(Marker&&) = default;
456 
457  Marker(arrow::ChunkedArray const*) {}
458  constexpr inline auto mark()
459  {
460  return value;
461  }
462 
463  static constexpr const char* mLabel = "Marker";
464 };
465 
466 template <int64_t START = 0, int64_t END = -1>
467 struct Index : o2::soa::IndexColumn<Index<START, END>> {
468  using base = o2::soa::IndexColumn<Index<START, END>>;
469  constexpr inline static int64_t start = START;
470  constexpr inline static int64_t end = END;
471 
472  Index() = default;
473  Index(Index const&) = default;
474  Index(Index&&) = default;
475 
476  Index& operator=(Index const&) = default;
477  Index& operator=(Index&&) = default;
478 
479  Index(arrow::ChunkedArray const*)
480  {
481  }
482 
483  constexpr inline int64_t rangeStart()
484  {
485  return START;
486  }
487 
488  constexpr inline int64_t rangeEnd()
489  {
490  return END;
491  }
492 
493  [[nodiscard]] int64_t index() const
494  {
495  return index<0>();
496  }
497 
498  [[nodiscard]] int64_t filteredIndex() const
499  {
500  return index<1>();
501  }
502 
503  [[nodiscard]] int64_t globalIndex() const
504  {
505  return index<0>() + offsets<0>();
506  }
507 
508  template <int N = 0>
509  [[nodiscard]] int64_t index() const
510  {
511  return *std::get<N>(rowIndices);
512  }
513 
514  template <int N = 0>
515  [[nodiscard]] int64_t offsets() const
516  {
517  return *std::get<N>(rowOffsets);
518  }
519 
520  void setIndices(std::tuple<int64_t const*, int64_t const*> indices)
521  {
522  rowIndices = indices;
523  }
524 
525  void setOffsets(std::tuple<uint64_t const*> offsets)
526  {
527  rowOffsets = offsets;
528  }
529 
530  static constexpr const char* mLabel = "Index";
531  using type = int64_t;
532 
533  using bindings_t = typename o2::framework::pack<>;
534  std::tuple<> boundIterators;
535  std::tuple<int64_t const*, int64_t const*> rowIndices;
538  std::tuple<uint64_t const*> rowOffsets;
539 };
540 
541 template <typename T>
542 using is_dynamic_t = framework::is_specialization<typename T::base, DynamicColumn>;
543 
544 namespace persistent_type_helper
545 {
546 // This checks both for the existence of the ::persistent member in the class T as well as the value returned stored in it.
547 // Hack: a pointer to any field of type int inside persistent. Both true_type and false_type do not have any int field, but anyways we pass nullptr.
548 // The compiler picks the version with exact number of arguments when only it can, i.e., when T::persistent is defined.
549 template <class T>
550 typename T::persistent test(int T::persistent::*);
551 
552 template <class>
553 std::false_type test(...);
554 } // namespace persistent_type_helper
555 
556 template <typename T>
557 using is_persistent_t = decltype(persistent_type_helper::test<T>(nullptr));
558 
559 template <typename T>
560 constexpr auto is_persistent_v = is_persistent_t<T>::value;
561 
562 template <typename T>
563 constexpr auto is_dynamic_v = is_dynamic_t<T>::value;
564 
565 template <typename T>
566 using is_external_index_t = typename std::conditional<is_index_column_v<T>, std::true_type, std::false_type>::type;
567 
568 template <typename T>
569 using is_self_index_t = typename std::conditional<is_self_index_column_v<T>, std::true_type, std::false_type>::type;
570 
571 template <typename T, template <auto...> class Ref>
572 struct is_index : std::false_type {
573 };
574 
575 template <template <auto...> class Ref, auto... Args>
576 struct is_index<Ref<Args...>, Ref> : std::true_type {
577 };
578 
579 template <typename T>
580 using is_index_t = is_index<T, Index>;
581 
582 struct IndexPolicyBase {
584  int64_t mRowIndex = 0;
586  uint64_t mOffset = 0;
587 };
588 
589 struct RowViewSentinel {
590  int64_t const index;
591 };
592 
593 struct FilteredIndexPolicy : IndexPolicyBase {
594  // We use -1 in the IndexPolicyBase to indicate that the index is
595  // invalid. What will validate the index is the this->setCursor()
596  // which happens below which will properly setup the first index
597  // by remapping the filtered index 0 to whatever unfiltered index
598  // it belongs to.
599  FilteredIndexPolicy(gsl::span<int64_t const> selection, int64_t rows, uint64_t offset = 0)
600  : IndexPolicyBase{-1, offset},
601  mSelectedRows(selection),
602  mMaxSelection(selection.size()),
603  nRows{rows}
604  {
605  this->setCursor(0);
606  }
607 
608  void resetSelection(gsl::span<int64_t const> selection)
609  {
610  mSelectedRows = selection;
611  mMaxSelection = selection.size();
612  this->setCursor(0);
613  }
614 
615  FilteredIndexPolicy() = default;
616  FilteredIndexPolicy(FilteredIndexPolicy&&) = default;
617  FilteredIndexPolicy(FilteredIndexPolicy const&) = default;
618  FilteredIndexPolicy& operator=(FilteredIndexPolicy const&) = default;
619  FilteredIndexPolicy& operator=(FilteredIndexPolicy&&) = default;
620 
621  [[nodiscard]] std::tuple<int64_t const*, int64_t const*>
622  getIndices() const
623  {
624  return std::make_tuple(&mRowIndex, &mSelectionRow);
625  }
626 
627  [[nodiscard]] std::tuple<uint64_t const*>
628  getOffsets() const
629  {
630  return std::make_tuple(&mOffset);
631  }
632 
633  void limitRange(int64_t start, int64_t end)
634  {
635  this->setCursor(start);
636  if (end >= 0) {
637  mMaxSelection = std::min(end, mMaxSelection);
638  }
639  }
640 
641  void setCursor(int64_t i)
642  {
643  mSelectionRow = i;
644  updateRow();
645  }
646 
647  void moveByIndex(int64_t i)
648  {
649  mSelectionRow += i;
650  updateRow();
651  }
652 
653  friend bool operator==(FilteredIndexPolicy const& lh, FilteredIndexPolicy const& rh)
654  {
655  return lh.mSelectionRow == rh.mSelectionRow;
656  }
657 
658  bool operator==(RowViewSentinel const& sentinel) const
659  {
660  return O2_BUILTIN_UNLIKELY(mSelectionRow == sentinel.index);
661  }
662 
666  void moveToEnd()
667  {
668  this->mSelectionRow = this->mMaxSelection;
669  this->mRowIndex = -1;
670  }
671 
672  [[nodiscard]] auto getSelectionRow() const
673  {
674  return mSelectionRow;
675  }
676 
677  [[nodiscard]] auto size() const
678  {
679  return mMaxSelection;
680  }
681 
682  [[nodiscard]] auto raw_size() const
683  {
684  return nRows;
685  }
686 
687  private:
688  inline void updateRow()
689  {
690  this->mRowIndex = O2_BUILTIN_LIKELY(mSelectionRow < mMaxSelection) ? mSelectedRows[mSelectionRow] : -1;
691  }
692  gsl::span<int64_t const> mSelectedRows;
693  int64_t mSelectionRow = 0;
694  int64_t mMaxSelection = 0;
695  int64_t nRows = 0;
696 };
697 
698 struct DefaultIndexPolicy : IndexPolicyBase {
700  DefaultIndexPolicy() = default;
701  DefaultIndexPolicy(DefaultIndexPolicy&&) = default;
702  DefaultIndexPolicy(DefaultIndexPolicy const&) = default;
703  DefaultIndexPolicy& operator=(DefaultIndexPolicy const&) = default;
704  DefaultIndexPolicy& operator=(DefaultIndexPolicy&&) = default;
705 
709  DefaultIndexPolicy(int64_t nRows, uint64_t offset)
710  : IndexPolicyBase{0, offset},
711  mMaxRow(nRows)
712  {
713  }
714 
715  DefaultIndexPolicy(FilteredIndexPolicy const& other)
716  : IndexPolicyBase{0, other.mOffset},
717  mMaxRow(other.raw_size())
718  {
719  }
720 
721  void limitRange(int64_t start, int64_t end)
722  {
723  this->setCursor(start);
724  if (end >= 0) {
725  mMaxRow = std::min(end, mMaxRow);
726  }
727  }
728 
729  [[nodiscard]] std::tuple<int64_t const*, int64_t const*>
730  getIndices() const
731  {
732  return std::make_tuple(&mRowIndex, &mRowIndex);
733  }
734 
735  [[nodiscard]] std::tuple<uint64_t const*>
736  getOffsets() const
737  {
738  return std::make_tuple(&mOffset);
739  }
740 
741  void setCursor(int64_t i)
742  {
743  this->mRowIndex = i;
744  }
745  void moveByIndex(int64_t i)
746  {
747  this->mRowIndex += i;
748  }
749 
750  void moveToEnd()
751  {
752  this->setCursor(mMaxRow);
753  }
754 
755  friend bool operator==(DefaultIndexPolicy const& lh, DefaultIndexPolicy const& rh)
756  {
757  return lh.mRowIndex == rh.mRowIndex;
758  }
759 
760  bool operator==(RowViewSentinel const& sentinel) const
761  {
762  return O2_BUILTIN_UNLIKELY(this->mRowIndex == sentinel.index);
763  }
764 
765  [[nodiscard]] auto size() const
766  {
767  return mMaxRow;
768  }
769 
770  int64_t mMaxRow = 0;
771 };
772 
773 template <typename... C>
774 class Table;
775 
778 template <typename C>
779 struct ColumnDataHolder {
780  C* first;
781  arrow::ChunkedArray* second;
782 };
783 
784 template <typename T, typename B>
785 concept CanBind = requires(T&& t) {
786  { t.B::mColumnIterator };
787 };
788 
789 template <typename IP, typename... C>
790 struct RowViewCore : public IP, C... {
791  public:
792  using policy_t = IP;
793  using table_t = o2::soa::Table<C...>;
794  using all_columns = framework::pack<C...>;
795  using persistent_columns_t = framework::selected_pack<is_persistent_t, C...>;
796  using index_columns_t = framework::selected_pack<is_index_t, C...>;
797  constexpr inline static bool has_index_v = framework::pack_size(index_columns_t{}) > 0;
798  using external_index_columns_t = framework::selected_pack<is_external_index_t, C...>;
799  using internal_index_columns_t = framework::selected_pack<is_self_index_t, C...>;
800 
801  RowViewCore(arrow::ChunkedArray* columnData[sizeof...(C)], IP&& policy)
802  : IP{policy},
803  C(columnData[framework::has_type_at_v<C>(all_columns{})])...
804  {
805  bind();
806  // In case we have an index column might need to constrain the actual
807  // number of rows in the view to the range provided by the index.
808  // FIXME: we should really understand what happens to an index when we
809  // have a RowViewFiltered.
810  if constexpr (has_index_v) {
811  this->limitRange(this->rangeStart(), this->rangeEnd());
812  }
813  }
814 
815  RowViewCore() = default;
816  RowViewCore(RowViewCore<IP, C...> const& other)
817  : IP{static_cast<IP const&>(other)},
818  C(static_cast<C const&>(other))...
819  {
820  bind();
821  }
822 
823  RowViewCore& operator=(RowViewCore other)
824  {
825  IP::operator=(static_cast<IP const&>(other));
826  (void(static_cast<C&>(*this) = static_cast<C>(other)), ...);
827  bind();
828  return *this;
829  }
830 
831  RowViewCore(RowViewCore<FilteredIndexPolicy, C...> const& other) requires std::is_same_v<IP, DefaultIndexPolicy>
832  : IP{static_cast<IP const&>(other)},
833  C(static_cast<C const&>(other))...
834  {
835  bind();
836  }
837 
838  RowViewCore& operator++()
839  {
840  this->moveByIndex(1);
841  return *this;
842  }
843 
844  RowViewCore operator++(int)
845  {
846  RowViewCore<IP, C...> copy = *this;
847  this->operator++();
848  return copy;
849  }
850 
851  RowViewCore& operator--()
852  {
853  this->moveByIndex(-1);
854  return *this;
855  }
856 
857  RowViewCore operator--(int)
858  {
859  RowViewCore<IP, C...> copy = *this;
860  this->operator--();
861  return copy;
862  }
863 
865  RowViewCore operator+(int64_t inc) const
866  {
867  RowViewCore copy = *this;
868  copy.moveByIndex(inc);
869  return copy;
870  }
871 
872  RowViewCore operator-(int64_t dec) const
873  {
874  return operator+(-dec);
875  }
876 
877  RowViewCore const& operator*() const
878  {
879  return *this;
880  }
881 
882  template <typename... CL, typename TA>
883  void doSetCurrentIndex(framework::pack<CL...>, TA* current)
884  {
885  (CL::setCurrent(current), ...);
886  }
887 
888  template <typename CL>
889  auto getCurrent() const
890  {
891  return CL::getCurrentRaw();
892  }
893 
894  template <typename... Cs>
895  auto getIndexBindingsImpl(framework::pack<Cs...>) const
896  {
897  return std::vector<o2::soa::Binding>{static_cast<Cs const&>(*this).getCurrentRaw()...};
898  }
899 
900  auto getIndexBindings() const
901  {
902  return getIndexBindingsImpl(external_index_columns_t{});
903  }
904 
905  template <typename... TA>
906  void bindExternalIndices(TA*... current)
907  {
908  (doSetCurrentIndex(external_index_columns_t{}, current), ...);
909  }
910 
911  template <typename... Cs>
912  void doSetCurrentIndexRaw(framework::pack<Cs...> p, std::vector<o2::soa::Binding>&& ptrs)
913  {
914  (Cs::setCurrentRaw(ptrs[framework::has_type_at_v<Cs>(p)]), ...);
915  }
916 
917  template <typename... Cs, typename I>
918  void doSetCurrentInternal(framework::pack<Cs...>, I const* ptr)
919  {
920  o2::soa::Binding b;
921  b.bind(ptr);
922  (Cs::setCurrentRaw(b), ...);
923  }
924 
925  void bindExternalIndicesRaw(std::vector<o2::soa::Binding>&& ptrs)
926  {
927  doSetCurrentIndexRaw(external_index_columns_t{}, std::forward<std::vector<o2::soa::Binding>>(ptrs));
928  }
929 
930  template <typename I>
931  void bindInternalIndices(I const* table)
932  {
933  doSetCurrentInternal(internal_index_columns_t{}, table);
934  }
935 
936  private:
939  template <typename... PC>
940  void checkNextChunk(framework::pack<PC...>)
941  {
942  (PC::mColumnIterator.checkNextChunk(), ...);
943  }
944 
946  template <typename... PC>
947  void doMoveToEnd(framework::pack<PC...>)
948  {
949  (PC::mColumnIterator.moveToEnd(), ...);
950  }
951 
954  void bind()
955  {
956  using namespace o2::soa;
957  auto f = framework::overloaded {
958  [this]<typename T>(T*) -> void requires is_persistent_v<T> { T::mColumnIterator.mCurrentPos = &this->mRowIndex; },
959  [this]<typename T>(T*) -> void requires is_dynamic_v<T> { bindDynamicColumn<T>(typename T::bindings_t{});},
960  [this]<typename T>(T*) -> void {},
961  };
962  (f(static_cast<C*>(nullptr)), ...);
963  if constexpr (has_index_v) {
964  this->setIndices(this->getIndices());
965  this->setOffsets(this->getOffsets());
966  }
967  }
968 
969  template <typename DC, typename... B>
970  auto bindDynamicColumn(framework::pack<B...>)
971  {
972  DC::boundIterators = std::make_tuple(getDynamicBinding<B>()...);
973  }
974 
975  // Sometimes dynamic columns are defined for tables in
976  // the hope that it will be joined / extended with another one which provides
977  // the full set of bindings. This is to avoid a compilation
978  // error if constructor for the table or any other thing involving a missing
979  // binding is preinstanciated.
980  template <typename B>
981  requires(CanBind<typename table_t::iterator, B>)
982  decltype(auto) getDynamicBinding()
983  {
984  static_assert(std::is_same_v<decltype(&(static_cast<B*>(this)->mColumnIterator)), std::decay_t<decltype(B::mColumnIterator)>*>, "foo");
985  return &(static_cast<B*>(this)->mColumnIterator);
986  //return static_cast<std::decay_t<decltype(B::mColumnIterator)>*>(nullptr);
987  }
988 
989  template <typename B>
990  decltype(auto) getDynamicBinding()
991  {
992  return static_cast<std::decay_t<decltype(B::mColumnIterator)>*>(nullptr);
993  }
994 };
995 
996 template <typename, typename = void>
997 constexpr bool is_type_with_policy_v = false;
998 
999 template <typename T>
1000 constexpr bool is_type_with_policy_v<T, std::void_t<decltype(sizeof(typename T::policy_t))>> = true;
1001 
1002 struct ArrowHelpers {
1003  static std::shared_ptr<arrow::Table> joinTables(std::vector<std::shared_ptr<arrow::Table>>&& tables);
1004  static std::shared_ptr<arrow::Table> concatTables(std::vector<std::shared_ptr<arrow::Table>>&& tables);
1005 };
1006 
1007 template <typename... T>
1008 using originals_pack_t = decltype(make_originals_from_type<T...>());
1009 
1010 template <typename T, typename... Os>
1011 constexpr bool are_bindings_compatible_v(framework::pack<Os...>&&)
1012 {
1013  if constexpr (is_type_with_originals_v<T>) {
1014  return (are_bindings_compatible_v<Os>(originals_pack_t<T>{}) || ...);
1015  } else {
1016  return ((std::is_same_v<T, Os> || is_index_equivalent_v<T, Os>) || ...);
1017  }
1018 }
1019 
1020 template <typename T, typename B>
1021 constexpr bool is_binding_compatible_v()
1022 {
1023  return are_bindings_compatible_v<T>(originals_pack_t<B>{});
1024 }
1025 
1026 template <typename T, typename B>
1027 struct is_binding_compatible : std::conditional_t<is_binding_compatible_v<T, typename B::binding_t>(), std::true_type, std::false_type> {
1028 };
1029 
1030 template <typename T>
1031 static constexpr std::string getLabelFromType()
1032 {
1033  if constexpr (soa::is_index_table_v<std::decay_t<T>>) {
1034  using TT = typename std::decay_t<T>::first_t;
1035  if constexpr (soa::is_type_with_originals_v<std::decay_t<TT>>) {
1036  using O = typename framework::pack_head_t<typename std::decay_t<TT>::originals>;
1037  using groupingMetadata = typename aod::MetadataTrait<O>::metadata;
1038  return std::string{groupingMetadata::tableLabel()};
1039  } else {
1040  using groupingMetadata = typename aod::MetadataTrait<TT>::metadata;
1041  return std::string{groupingMetadata::tableLabel()};
1042  }
1043  } else if constexpr (soa::is_type_with_originals_v<std::decay_t<T>>) {
1044  using TT = typename framework::pack_head_t<typename std::decay_t<T>::originals>;
1045  if constexpr (soa::is_with_base_table_v<typename aod::MetadataTrait<TT>::metadata>) {
1046  using TTT = typename aod::MetadataTrait<TT>::metadata::base_table_t;
1047  return getLabelFromType<TTT>();
1048  } else {
1049  using groupingMetadata = typename aod::MetadataTrait<TT>::metadata;
1050  return std::string{groupingMetadata::tableLabel()};
1051  }
1052  } else {
1053  if constexpr (soa::is_with_base_table_v<typename aod::MetadataTrait<T>::metadata>) {
1054  using TT = typename aod::MetadataTrait<T>::metadata::base_table_t;
1055  return getLabelFromType<TT>();
1056  } else {
1057  using groupingMetadata = typename aod::MetadataTrait<std::decay_t<T>>::metadata;
1058  return std::string{groupingMetadata::tableLabel()};
1059  }
1060  }
1061 }
1062 
1063 template <typename... C>
1064 static constexpr auto hasColumnForKey(framework::pack<C...>, std::string const& key)
1065 {
1066  return ((C::inherited_t::mLabel == key) || ...);
1067 }
1068 
1069 template <typename T>
1070 static constexpr std::pair<bool, std::string> hasKey(std::string const& key)
1071 {
1072  return {hasColumnForKey(typename T::persistent_columns_t{}, key), getLabelFromType<T>()};
1073 }
1074 
1075 template <typename... C>
1076 static constexpr auto haveKey(framework::pack<C...>, std::string const& key)
1077 {
1078  return std::vector{hasKey<C>(key)...};
1079 }
1080 
1081 void notFoundColumn(const char* label, const char* key);
1082 void missingOptionalPreslice(const char* label, const char* key);
1083 
1084 template <typename T, bool OPT = false>
1085 static constexpr std::string getLabelFromTypeForKey(std::string const& key)
1086 {
1087  if constexpr (soa::is_type_with_originals_v<std::decay_t<T>>) {
1088  using Os = typename std::decay_t<T>::originals;
1089  auto locate = haveKey(Os{}, key);
1090  auto it = std::find_if(locate.begin(), locate.end(), [](auto const& x) { return x.first; });
1091  if (it != locate.end()) {
1092  return it->second;
1093  }
1094  } else {
1095  auto locate = hasKey<std::decay_t<T>>(key);
1096  if (locate.first) {
1097  return locate.second;
1098  }
1099  }
1100  if constexpr (!OPT) {
1101  notFoundColumn(getLabelFromType<std::decay_t<T>>().data(), key.data());
1102  } else {
1103  return "[MISSING]";
1104  }
1105  O2_BUILTIN_UNREACHABLE();
1106 }
1107 
1108 template <typename B, typename... C>
1109 consteval static bool hasIndexTo(framework::pack<C...>&&)
1110 {
1111  return (o2::soa::is_binding_compatible_v<B, typename C::binding_t>() || ...);
1112 }
1113 
1114 template <typename B, typename... C>
1115 consteval static bool hasSortedIndexTo(framework::pack<C...>&&)
1116 {
1117  return ((C::sorted && o2::soa::is_binding_compatible_v<B, typename C::binding_t>()) || ...);
1118 }
1119 
1120 template <typename B, typename Z>
1121 consteval static bool relatedByIndex()
1122 {
1123  return hasIndexTo<B>(typename Z::table_t::external_index_columns_t{});
1124 }
1125 
1126 template <typename B, typename Z>
1127 consteval static bool relatedBySortedIndex()
1128 {
1129  return hasSortedIndexTo<B>(typename Z::table_t::external_index_columns_t{});
1130 }
1131 } // namespace o2::soa
1132 
1133 namespace o2::framework
1134 {
1135 template <typename T, bool OPT = false, bool SORTED = true>
1136 struct PresliceBase {
1137  constexpr static bool sorted = SORTED;
1138  constexpr static bool optional = OPT;
1139  using target_t = T;
1140  const std::string binding;
1141 
1142  PresliceBase(expressions::BindingNode index_)
1143  : binding{o2::soa::getLabelFromTypeForKey<T, OPT>(index_.name)},
1144  bindingKey{binding, index_.name} {}
1145 
1146  void updateSliceInfo(std::conditional_t<SORTED, SliceInfoPtr, SliceInfoUnsortedPtr>&& si)
1147  {
1148  sliceInfo = si;
1149  }
1150 
1151  std::shared_ptr<arrow::Table> getSliceFor(int value, std::shared_ptr<arrow::Table> const& input, uint64_t& offset) const
1152  {
1153  if constexpr (OPT) {
1154  if (isMissing()) {
1155  return nullptr;
1156  }
1157  }
1158  if constexpr (SORTED) {
1159  auto [offset_, count] = sliceInfo.getSliceFor(value);
1160  auto output = input->Slice(offset_, count);
1161  offset = static_cast<int64_t>(offset_);
1162  return output;
1163  } else {
1164  static_assert(SORTED, "Wrong method called for unsorted cache");
1165  }
1166  }
1167 
1168  gsl::span<const int64_t> getSliceFor(int value) const
1169  {
1170  if constexpr (OPT) {
1171  if (isMissing()) {
1172  return {};
1173  }
1174  }
1175  if constexpr (!SORTED) {
1176  return sliceInfo.getSliceFor(value);
1177  } else {
1178  static_assert(!SORTED, "Wrong method called for sorted cache");
1179  }
1180  }
1181 
1182  bool isMissing() const
1183  {
1184  return binding == "[MISSING]";
1185  }
1186 
1187  StringPair const& getBindingKey() const
1188  {
1189  return bindingKey;
1190  }
1191 
1192  std::conditional_t<SORTED, SliceInfoPtr, SliceInfoUnsortedPtr> sliceInfo;
1193 
1194  StringPair bindingKey;
1195 };
1196 
1197 template <typename T>
1198 using PresliceUnsorted = PresliceBase<T, false, false>;
1199 template <typename T>
1200 using PresliceUnsortedOptional = PresliceBase<T, true, false>;
1201 template <typename T>
1202 using Preslice = PresliceBase<T, false, true>;
1203 template <typename T>
1204 using PresliceOptional = PresliceBase<T, true, true>;
1205 
1206 } // namespace o2::framework
1207 
1208 namespace o2::soa
1209 {
1211 template <typename T>
1212 inline constexpr bool is_soa_iterator_v = framework::is_base_of_template_v<RowViewCore, T> || framework::is_specialization_v<T, RowViewCore>;
1213 
1214 template <typename T>
1215 inline consteval bool is_soa_filtered_iterator_v()
1216 {
1217  if constexpr (!is_soa_iterator_v<T>) {
1218  return false;
1219  } else {
1220  if constexpr (std::is_same_v<typename T::policy_t, soa::FilteredIndexPolicy>) {
1221  return true;
1222  } else {
1223  return false;
1224  }
1225  }
1226 }
1227 
1228 template <typename T>
1229 using is_soa_table_t = typename framework::is_specialization<T, soa::Table>;
1230 
1231 template <typename T>
1232 inline constexpr bool is_soa_table_like_v = framework::is_base_of_template_v<soa::Table, T>;
1233 
1234 template <typename T>
1235 class FilteredBase;
1236 template <typename T>
1237 class Filtered;
1238 
1239 template <typename T>
1240 inline constexpr bool is_soa_filtered_v = framework::is_base_of_template_v<soa::FilteredBase, T>;
1241 
1243 template <typename... Is>
1244 static consteval auto extractBindings(framework::pack<Is...>)
1245 {
1246  return framework::pack<typename Is::binding_t...>{};
1247 }
1248 
1249 SelectionVector selectionToVector(gandiva::Selection const& sel);
1250 
1251 template <typename T, typename C, bool OPT, bool SORTED>
1252 auto doSliceBy(T const* table, o2::framework::PresliceBase<C, OPT, SORTED> const& container, int value)
1253 {
1254  if constexpr (o2::soa::is_binding_compatible_v<C, T>()) {
1255  if constexpr (OPT) {
1256  if (container.isMissing()) {
1257  missingOptionalPreslice(getLabelFromType<std::decay_t<T>>().data(), container.bindingKey.second.c_str());
1258  }
1259  }
1260  if constexpr (SORTED) {
1261  uint64_t offset = 0;
1262  auto out = container.getSliceFor(value, table->asArrowTable(), offset);
1263  auto t = typename T::self_t({out}, offset);
1264  table->copyIndexBindings(t);
1265  t.bindInternalIndicesTo(table);
1266  return t;
1267  } else {
1268  auto selection = container.getSliceFor(value);
1269  if constexpr (soa::is_soa_filtered_v<T>) {
1270  auto t = soa::Filtered<typename T::base_t>({table->asArrowTable()}, selection);
1271  table->copyIndexBindings(t);
1272  t.bindInternalIndicesTo(table);
1273  t.intersectWithSelection(table->getSelectedRows()); // intersect filters
1274  return t;
1275  } else {
1276  auto t = soa::Filtered<T>({table->asArrowTable()}, selection);
1277  table->copyIndexBindings(t);
1278  t.bindInternalIndicesTo(table);
1279  return t;
1280  }
1281  }
1282  } else {
1283  if constexpr (SORTED) {
1284  static_assert(o2::framework::always_static_assert_v<C>, "Wrong Preslice<> entry used: incompatible type");
1285  } else {
1286  static_assert(o2::framework::always_static_assert_v<C>, "Wrong PresliceUnsorted<> entry used: incompatible type");
1287  }
1288  }
1289 }
1290 
1291 template <typename T>
1292 auto prepareFilteredSlice(T const* table, std::shared_ptr<arrow::Table> slice, uint64_t offset)
1293 {
1294  if (offset >= table->tableSize()) {
1295  if constexpr (soa::is_soa_filtered_v<T>) {
1296  Filtered<typename T::base_t> fresult{{{slice}}, SelectionVector{}, 0};
1297  table->copyIndexBindings(fresult);
1298  return fresult;
1299  } else {
1300  typename T::self_t fresult{{{slice}}, SelectionVector{}, 0};
1301  table->copyIndexBindings(fresult);
1302  return fresult;
1303  }
1304  }
1305  auto start = offset;
1306  auto end = start + slice->num_rows();
1307  auto mSelectedRows = table->getSelectedRows();
1308  auto start_iterator = std::lower_bound(mSelectedRows.begin(), mSelectedRows.end(), start);
1309  auto stop_iterator = std::lower_bound(start_iterator, mSelectedRows.end(), end);
1310  SelectionVector slicedSelection{start_iterator, stop_iterator};
1311  std::transform(slicedSelection.begin(), slicedSelection.end(), slicedSelection.begin(),
1312  [&start](int64_t idx) {
1313  return idx - static_cast<int64_t>(start);
1314  });
1315  if constexpr (soa::is_soa_filtered_v<T>) {
1316  Filtered<typename T::base_t> fresult{{{slice}}, std::move(slicedSelection), start};
1317  table->copyIndexBindings(fresult);
1318  return fresult;
1319  } else {
1320  typename T::self_t fresult{{{slice}}, std::move(slicedSelection), start};
1321  table->copyIndexBindings(fresult);
1322  return fresult;
1323  }
1324 }
1325 
1326 template <typename T, typename C, bool OPT>
1327 auto doFilteredSliceBy(T const* table, o2::framework::PresliceBase<C, OPT> const& container, int value)
1328 {
1329  if constexpr (o2::soa::is_binding_compatible_v<C, T>()) {
1330  if constexpr (OPT) {
1331  if (container.isMissing()) {
1332  missingOptionalPreslice(getLabelFromType<T>().data(), container.bindingKey.second.c_str());
1333  }
1334  }
1335  uint64_t offset = 0;
1336  auto slice = container.getSliceFor(value, table->asArrowTable(), offset);
1337  return prepareFilteredSlice(table, slice, offset);
1338  } else {
1339  static_assert(o2::framework::always_static_assert_v<C>, "Wrong Preslice<> entry used: incompatible type");
1340  }
1341 }
1342 
1343 template <typename T>
1344 auto doSliceByCached(T const* table, framework::expressions::BindingNode const& node, int value, o2::framework::SliceCache& cache)
1345 {
1346  auto localCache = cache.ptr->getCacheFor({o2::soa::getLabelFromTypeForKey<T>(node.name), node.name});
1347  auto [offset, count] = localCache.getSliceFor(value);
1348  auto t = typename T::self_t({table->asArrowTable()->Slice(static_cast<uint64_t>(offset), count)}, static_cast<uint64_t>(offset));
1349  table->copyIndexBindings(t);
1350  return t;
1351 }
1352 
1353 template <typename T>
1354 auto doFilteredSliceByCached(T const* table, framework::expressions::BindingNode const& node, int value, o2::framework::SliceCache& cache)
1355 {
1356  auto localCache = cache.ptr->getCacheFor({o2::soa::getLabelFromTypeForKey<T>(node.name), node.name});
1357  auto [offset, count] = localCache.getSliceFor(value);
1358  auto slice = table->asArrowTable()->Slice(static_cast<uint64_t>(offset), count);
1359  return prepareFilteredSlice(table, slice, offset);
1360 }
1361 
1362 template <typename T>
1363 auto doSliceByCachedUnsorted(T const* table, framework::expressions::BindingNode const& node, int value, o2::framework::SliceCache& cache)
1364 {
1365  auto localCache = cache.ptr->getCacheUnsortedFor({o2::soa::getLabelFromTypeForKey<T>(node.name), node.name});
1366  if constexpr (soa::is_soa_filtered_v<T>) {
1367  auto t = typename T::self_t({table->asArrowTable()}, localCache.getSliceFor(value));
1368  t.intersectWithSelection(table->getSelectedRows());
1369  table->copyIndexBindings(t);
1370  return t;
1371  } else {
1372  auto t = Filtered<T>({table->asArrowTable()}, localCache.getSliceFor(value));
1373  table->copyIndexBindings(t);
1374  return t;
1375  }
1376 }
1377 
1378 template <typename T>
1379 auto select(T const& t, framework::expressions::Filter const& f)
1380 {
1381  return Filtered<T>({t.asArrowTable()}, selectionToVector(framework::expressions::createSelection(t.asArrowTable(), f)));
1382 }
1383 
1384 arrow::ChunkedArray* getIndexFromLabel(arrow::Table* table, const char* label);
1385 
1388 template <typename... C>
1389 class Table
1390 {
1391  public:
1392  using self_t = Table<C...>;
1393  using table_t = Table<C...>;
1394  using columns = framework::pack<C...>;
1395  using column_types = framework::pack<typename C::type...>;
1396  using persistent_columns_t = framework::selected_pack<is_persistent_t, C...>;
1397  using external_index_columns_t = framework::selected_pack<is_external_index_t, C...>;
1398  using internal_index_columns_t = framework::selected_pack<is_self_index_t, C...>;
1399 
1400  static constexpr auto hashes()
1401  {
1402  return std::set{{o2::framework::TypeIdHelpers::uniqueId<C>()...}};
1403  }
1404 
1405  template <typename IP, typename Parent, typename... T>
1406  struct RowViewBase : public RowViewCore<IP, C...> {
1407 
1408  using external_index_columns_t = framework::selected_pack<is_external_index_t, C...>;
1409  using bindings_pack_t = decltype(extractBindings(external_index_columns_t{}));
1410  using parent_t = Parent;
1411  using originals = originals_pack_t<T...>;
1412  using policy_t = IP;
1413 
1414  RowViewBase() = default;
1415 
1416  RowViewBase(arrow::ChunkedArray* columnData[sizeof...(C)], IP&& policy)
1417  : RowViewCore<IP, C...>(columnData, std::forward<decltype(policy)>(policy))
1418  {
1419  }
1420 
1421  template <typename P, typename... O>
1422  RowViewBase& operator=(RowViewBase<IP, P, O...> other) requires std::is_same_v<typename P::table_t, typename Parent::table_t>
1423  {
1424  static_cast<RowViewCore<IP, C...>&>(*this) = static_cast<RowViewCore<IP, C...>>(other);
1425  return *this;
1426  }
1427 
1428  template <typename P>
1429  RowViewBase& operator=(RowViewBase<IP, P, T...> other)
1430  {
1431  static_cast<RowViewCore<IP, C...>&>(*this) = static_cast<RowViewCore<IP, C...>>(other);
1432  return *this;
1433  }
1434 
1435  template <typename P>
1436  RowViewBase& operator=(RowViewBase<FilteredIndexPolicy, P, T...> other) requires std::is_same_v<IP, DefaultIndexPolicy>
1437  {
1438  static_cast<RowViewCore<IP, C...>&>(*this) = static_cast<RowViewCore<FilteredIndexPolicy, C...>>(other);
1439  return *this;
1440  }
1441 
1442  template <typename P, typename... O>
1443  RowViewBase(RowViewBase<IP, P, O...> const& other) requires std::is_same_v<typename P::table_t, typename Parent::table_t>
1444  {
1445  *this = other;
1446  }
1447 
1448  template <typename P, typename... O>
1449  RowViewBase(RowViewBase<IP, P, O...>&& other) noexcept requires std::is_same_v<typename P::table_t, typename Parent::table_t>
1450  {
1451  *this = other;
1452  }
1453 
1454  template <typename P>
1455  RowViewBase(RowViewBase<IP, P, T...> const& other)
1456  {
1457  *this = other;
1458  }
1459 
1460  template <typename P>
1461  RowViewBase(RowViewBase<IP, P, T...>&& other) noexcept
1462  {
1463  *this = other;
1464  }
1465 
1466  template <typename P>
1467  RowViewBase(RowViewBase<FilteredIndexPolicy, P, T...> other) requires std::is_same_v<IP, DefaultIndexPolicy>
1468  {
1469  *this = other;
1470  }
1471 
1472  RowViewBase& operator=(RowViewSentinel const& other)
1473  {
1474  this->mRowIndex = other.index;
1475  return *this;
1476  }
1477 
1478  template <typename P>
1479  void matchTo(RowViewBase<IP, P, T...> const& other)
1480  {
1481  this->mRowIndex = other.mRowIndex;
1482  }
1483 
1484  template <typename P, typename... O>
1485  void matchTo(RowViewBase<IP, P, O...> const& other) requires std::is_same_v<typename P::table_t, typename Parent::table_t>
1486  {
1487  this->mRowIndex = other.mRowIndex;
1488  }
1489 
1490  template <typename TI>
1491  auto getId() const
1492  {
1493  using decayed = std::decay_t<TI>;
1494  if constexpr (framework::has_type<decayed>(bindings_pack_t{})) { // index to another table
1495  constexpr auto idx = framework::has_type_at_v<decayed>(bindings_pack_t{});
1496  return framework::pack_element_t<idx, external_index_columns_t>::getId();
1497  } else if constexpr (std::is_same_v<decayed, Parent>) { // self index
1498  return this->globalIndex();
1499  } else if constexpr (is_index_t<decayed>::value && decayed::mLabel == "Index") { // soa::Index<>
1500  return this->globalIndex();
1501  } else {
1502  return static_cast<int32_t>(-1);
1503  }
1504  }
1505 
1506  template <typename CD, typename... CDArgs>
1507  auto getDynamicColumn() const
1508  {
1509  using decayed = std::decay_t<CD>;
1510  static_assert(is_dynamic_t<decayed>(), "Requested column is not a dynamic column");
1511  return static_cast<decayed>(*this).template getDynamicValue<CDArgs...>();
1512  }
1513 
1514  template <typename B, typename CC>
1515  auto getValue() const
1516  {
1517  using COL = std::decay_t<CC>;
1518  static_assert(is_dynamic_t<COL>() || is_persistent_v<COL>, "Should be persistent or dynamic column with no argument that has a return type convertable to float");
1519  return static_cast<B>(static_cast<COL>(*this).get());
1520  }
1521 
1522  template <typename B, typename... CCs>
1523  std::array<B, sizeof...(CCs)> getValues() const
1524  {
1525  static_assert(std::is_same_v<B, float> || std::is_same_v<B, double>, "The common return type should be float or double");
1526  return {getValue<B, CCs>()...};
1527  }
1528 
1529  using IP::size;
1530 
1531  using RowViewCore<IP, C...>::operator++;
1532 
1534  RowViewBase operator+(int64_t inc) const
1535  {
1536  RowViewBase copy = *this;
1537  copy.moveByIndex(inc);
1538  return copy;
1539  }
1540 
1541  RowViewBase operator-(int64_t dec) const
1542  {
1543  return operator+(-dec);
1544  }
1545 
1546  RowViewBase const& operator*() const
1547  {
1548  return *this;
1549  }
1550  };
1551  template <typename P, typename... Ts>
1552  using RowView = RowViewBase<DefaultIndexPolicy, P, Ts...>;
1553 
1554  template <typename P, typename... Ts>
1555  using RowViewFiltered = RowViewBase<FilteredIndexPolicy, P, Ts...>;
1556 
1557  using iterator = RowView<table_t, table_t>;
1558  using const_iterator = RowView<table_t, table_t>;
1559  using unfiltered_iterator = RowView<table_t, table_t>;
1560  using unfiltered_const_iterator = RowView<table_t, table_t>;
1561  using filtered_iterator = RowViewFiltered<table_t, table_t>;
1562  using filtered_const_iterator = RowViewFiltered<table_t, table_t>;
1563 
1564  Table(std::shared_ptr<arrow::Table> table, uint64_t offset = 0)
1565  : mTable(table),
1566  mEnd{table->num_rows()},
1567  mOffset(offset)
1568  {
1569  if (mTable->num_rows() == 0) {
1570  for (size_t ci = 0; ci < sizeof...(C); ++ci) {
1571  mColumnChunks[ci] = nullptr;
1572  }
1573  mBegin = mEnd;
1574  } else {
1575  arrow::ChunkedArray* lookups[] = {lookupColumn<C>()...};
1576  for (size_t ci = 0; ci < sizeof...(C); ++ci) {
1577  mColumnChunks[ci] = lookups[ci];
1578  }
1579  mBegin = unfiltered_iterator{mColumnChunks, {table->num_rows(), offset}};
1580  mBegin.bindInternalIndices(this);
1581  }
1582  }
1583 
1587  Table(std::vector<std::shared_ptr<arrow::Table>>&& tables, uint64_t offset = 0)
1588  : Table(ArrowHelpers::joinTables(std::move(tables)), offset)
1589  {
1590  }
1591 
1592  template <typename Key>
1593  inline arrow::ChunkedArray* getIndexToKey()
1594  {
1595  if constexpr (framework::has_type_conditional<is_binding_compatible, Key>(external_index_columns_t{})) {
1596  using IC = framework::pack_element_t<framework::has_type_at_conditional<is_binding_compatible, Key>(external_index_columns_t{}), external_index_columns_t>;
1597  return mColumnChunks[framework::has_type_at<IC>(persistent_columns_t{})];
1598  } else if constexpr (std::is_same_v<table_t, Key>) {
1599  return nullptr;
1600  } else {
1601  static_assert(framework::always_static_assert_v<Key>, "This table does not have an index to this type");
1602  }
1603  }
1604 
1605  auto& cached_begin()
1606  {
1607  return mBegin;
1608  }
1609 
1610  auto const& cached_begin() const
1611  {
1612  return mBegin;
1613  }
1614 
1615  unfiltered_iterator begin()
1616  {
1617  return unfiltered_iterator(mBegin);
1618  }
1619 
1620  RowViewSentinel end()
1621  {
1622  return RowViewSentinel{mEnd};
1623  }
1624 
1625  filtered_iterator filtered_begin(gsl::span<int64_t const> selection)
1626  {
1627  // Note that the FilteredIndexPolicy will never outlive the selection which
1628  // is held by the table, so we are safe passing the bare pointer. If it does it
1629  // means that the iterator on a table is outliving the table itself, which is
1630  // a bad idea.
1631  return filtered_iterator(mColumnChunks, {selection, mTable->num_rows(), mOffset});
1632  }
1633 
1634  iterator iteratorAt(uint64_t i) const
1635  {
1636  return rawIteratorAt(i);
1637  }
1638 
1639  unfiltered_iterator rawIteratorAt(uint64_t i) const
1640  {
1641  auto it = mBegin;
1642  it.setCursor(i);
1643  return it;
1644  }
1645 
1646  unfiltered_const_iterator begin() const
1647  {
1648  return unfiltered_const_iterator(mBegin);
1649  }
1650 
1651  [[nodiscard]] RowViewSentinel end() const
1652  {
1653  return RowViewSentinel{mEnd};
1654  }
1655 
1657  [[nodiscard]] std::shared_ptr<arrow::Table> asArrowTable() const
1658  {
1659  return mTable;
1660  }
1662  auto offset() const
1663  {
1664  return mOffset;
1665  }
1667  [[nodiscard]] int64_t size() const
1668  {
1669  return mTable->num_rows();
1670  }
1671 
1672  [[nodiscard]] int64_t tableSize() const
1673  {
1674  return size();
1675  }
1676 
1679  template <typename... TA>
1680  void bindExternalIndices(TA*... current)
1681  {
1682  mBegin.bindExternalIndices(current...);
1683  }
1684 
1685  template <typename I>
1686  void bindInternalIndicesTo(I const* ptr)
1687  {
1688  mBegin.bindInternalIndices(ptr);
1689  }
1690 
1691  void bindInternalIndicesExplicit(o2::soa::Binding binding)
1692  {
1693  doBindInternalIndicesExplicit(internal_index_columns_t{}, binding);
1694  }
1695 
1696  template <typename... Cs>
1697  void doBindInternalIndicesExplicit(framework::pack<Cs...>, o2::soa::Binding binding)
1698  {
1699  (static_cast<Cs>(mBegin).setCurrentRaw(binding), ...);
1700  }
1701 
1702  void bindExternalIndicesRaw(std::vector<o2::soa::Binding>&& ptrs)
1703  {
1704  mBegin.bindExternalIndicesRaw(std::forward<std::vector<o2::soa::Binding>>(ptrs));
1705  }
1706 
1707  template <typename T, typename... Cs>
1708  void doCopyIndexBindings(framework::pack<Cs...>, T& dest) const
1709  {
1710  dest.bindExternalIndicesRaw(mBegin.getIndexBindings());
1711  }
1712 
1713  template <typename T>
1714  void copyIndexBindings(T& dest) const
1715  {
1716  doCopyIndexBindings(external_index_columns_t{}, dest);
1717  }
1718 
1719  auto select(framework::expressions::Filter const& f) const
1720  {
1721  auto t = o2::soa::select(*this, f);
1722  copyIndexBindings(t);
1723  return t;
1724  }
1725 
1726  auto sliceByCached(framework::expressions::BindingNode const& node, int value, o2::framework::SliceCache& cache) const
1727  {
1728  return doSliceByCached(this, node, value, cache);
1729  }
1730 
1731  auto sliceByCachedUnsorted(framework::expressions::BindingNode const& node, int value, o2::framework::SliceCache& cache) const
1732  {
1733  return doSliceByCachedUnsorted(this, node, value, cache);
1734  }
1735 
1736  template <typename T1, bool OPT, bool SORTED>
1737  auto sliceBy(o2::framework::PresliceBase<T1, OPT, SORTED> const& container, int value) const
1738  {
1739  return doSliceBy(this, container, value);
1740  }
1741 
1742  auto rawSlice(uint64_t start, uint64_t end) const
1743  {
1744  return self_t{mTable->Slice(start, end - start + 1), start};
1745  }
1746 
1747  auto emptySlice() const
1748  {
1749  return self_t{mTable->Slice(0, 0), 0};
1750  }
1751 
1752  protected:
1754  uint64_t mOffset;
1755 
1756  private:
1757  template <typename T>
1758  arrow::ChunkedArray* lookupColumn()
1759  {
1760  if constexpr (T::persistent::value) {
1761  auto label = T::columnLabel();
1762  return getIndexFromLabel(mTable.get(), label);
1763  } else {
1764  return nullptr;
1765  }
1766  }
1767  std::shared_ptr<arrow::Table> mTable;
1768  // Cached pointers to the ChunkedArray associated to a column
1769  arrow::ChunkedArray* mColumnChunks[sizeof...(C)];
1771  unfiltered_iterator mBegin;
1773  RowViewSentinel mEnd;
1774 };
1775 
1776 template <typename T>
1777 struct PackToTable {
1778  static_assert(framework::always_static_assert_v<T>, "Not a pack");
1779 };
1780 
1781 template <typename... C>
1782 struct PackToTable<framework::pack<C...>> {
1783  using table = o2::soa::Table<C...>;
1784 };
1785 
1786 template <typename... T>
1787 struct TableWrap {
1788  using all_columns = framework::concatenated_pack_unique_t<typename T::columns...>;
1789  using table_t = typename PackToTable<all_columns>::table;
1790 };
1791 
1792 template <typename... T>
1793 struct TableIntersect {
1794  using all_columns = framework::full_intersected_pack_t<typename T::columns...>;
1795  using table_t = typename PackToTable<all_columns>::table;
1796 };
1797 
1800 template <typename INHERIT>
1801 class TableMetadata
1802 {
1803  public:
1804  static constexpr char const* tableLabel() { return INHERIT::mLabel; }
1805  static constexpr char const (&origin())[5] { return INHERIT::mOrigin; }
1806  static constexpr char const (&description())[16] { return INHERIT::mDescription; }
1807  static constexpr o2::header::DataHeader::SubSpecificationType version() { return INHERIT::mVersion; }
1808  static std::string sourceSpec() { return fmt::format("{}/{}/{}/{}", INHERIT::mLabel, INHERIT::mOrigin, INHERIT::mDescription, INHERIT::mVersion); };
1809 };
1810 
1812 template <typename... T>
1813 constexpr auto join(T const&... t)
1814 {
1815  return typename o2::soa::TableWrap<T...>::table_t(ArrowHelpers::joinTables({t.asArrowTable()...}));
1816 }
1817 
1818 template <typename... T>
1819 constexpr auto concat(T const&... t)
1820 {
1821  return typename o2::soa::TableIntersect<T...>::table_t(ArrowHelpers::concatTables({t.asArrowTable()...}));
1822 }
1823 
1824 template <typename T1, typename T2>
1825 using ConcatBase = decltype(concat(std::declval<T1>(), std::declval<T2>()));
1826 
1827 void notBoundTable(const char* tableName);
1828 
1829 namespace row_helpers
1830 {
1831 template <typename... Cs>
1832 std::array<arrow::ChunkedArray*, sizeof...(Cs)> getArrowColumns(arrow::Table* table, framework::pack<Cs...>)
1833 {
1834  static_assert(std::conjunction_v<typename Cs::persistent...>, "Arrow columns: only persistent columns accepted (not dynamic and not index ones");
1835  return std::array<arrow::ChunkedArray*, sizeof...(Cs)>{o2::soa::getIndexFromLabel(table, Cs::columnLabel())...};
1836 }
1837 
1838 template <typename... Cs>
1839 std::array<std::shared_ptr<arrow::Array>, sizeof...(Cs)> getChunks(arrow::Table* table, framework::pack<Cs...>, uint64_t ci)
1840 {
1841  static_assert(std::conjunction_v<typename Cs::persistent...>, "Arrow chunks: only persistent columns accepted (not dynamic and not index ones");
1842  return std::array<std::shared_ptr<arrow::Array>, sizeof...(Cs)>{o2::soa::getIndexFromLabel(table, Cs::columnLabel())->chunk(ci)...};
1843 }
1844 
1845 template <typename T, typename C>
1846 typename C::type getSingleRowPersistentData(arrow::Table* table, T& rowIterator, uint64_t ci = std::numeric_limits<uint64_t>::max(), uint64_t ai = std::numeric_limits<uint64_t>::max())
1847 {
1848  if (ci == std::numeric_limits<uint64_t>::max() || ai == std::numeric_limits<uint64_t>::max()) {
1849  auto colIterator = static_cast<C>(rowIterator).getIterator();
1850  ci = colIterator.mCurrentChunk;
1851  ai = *(colIterator.mCurrentPos) - colIterator.mFirstIndex;
1852  }
1853  return std::static_pointer_cast<o2::soa::arrow_array_for_t<typename C::type>>(o2::soa::getIndexFromLabel(table, C::columnLabel())->chunk(ci))->raw_values()[ai];
1854 }
1855 
1856 template <typename T, typename C>
1857 typename C::type getSingleRowDynamicData(T& rowIterator, uint64_t globalIndex = std::numeric_limits<uint64_t>::max())
1858 {
1859  if (globalIndex != std::numeric_limits<uint64_t>::max() && globalIndex != *std::get<0>(rowIterator.getIndices())) {
1860  rowIterator.setCursor(globalIndex);
1861  }
1862  return rowIterator.template getDynamicColumn<C>();
1863 }
1864 
1865 template <typename T, typename C>
1866 typename C::type getSingleRowIndexData(T& rowIterator, uint64_t globalIndex = std::numeric_limits<uint64_t>::max())
1867 {
1868  if (globalIndex != std::numeric_limits<uint64_t>::max() && globalIndex != *std::get<0>(rowIterator.getIndices())) {
1869  rowIterator.setCursor(globalIndex);
1870  }
1871  return rowIterator.template getId<C>();
1872 }
1873 
1874 template <typename T, typename C>
1875 typename C::type getSingleRowData(arrow::Table* table, T& rowIterator, uint64_t ci = -1, uint64_t ai = std::numeric_limits<uint64_t>::max(), uint64_t globalIndex = std::numeric_limits<uint64_t>::max())
1876 {
1877  using decayed = std::decay_t<C>;
1878  if constexpr (decayed::persistent::value) {
1879  return getSingleRowPersistentData<T, C>(table, rowIterator, ci, ai);
1880  } else if constexpr (o2::soa::is_dynamic_t<decayed>()) {
1881  return getSingleRowDynamicData<T, C>(rowIterator, globalIndex);
1882  } else if constexpr (o2::soa::is_index_t<decayed>::value) {
1883  return getSingleRowIndexData<T, C>(rowIterator, globalIndex);
1884  } else {
1885  static_assert(!sizeof(decayed*), "Unrecognized column kind"); // A trick to delay static_assert until we actually instantiate this branch
1886  }
1887 }
1888 
1889 template <typename T, typename... Cs>
1890 std::tuple<typename Cs::type...> getRowData(arrow::Table* table, T rowIterator, uint64_t ci = std::numeric_limits<uint64_t>::max(), uint64_t ai = std::numeric_limits<uint64_t>::max(), uint64_t globalIndex = std::numeric_limits<uint64_t>::max())
1891 {
1892  return std::make_tuple(getSingleRowData<T, Cs>(table, rowIterator, ci, ai, globalIndex)...);
1893 }
1894 } // namespace row_helpers
1895 } // namespace o2::soa
1896 
1897 #define DECLARE_SOA_VERSIONING() \
1898  template <typename T> \
1899  constexpr int getVersion() \
1900  { \
1901  if constexpr (o2::soa::is_type_with_metadata_v<MetadataTrait<T>>) { \
1902  return MetadataTrait<T>::metadata::version(); \
1903  } else if constexpr (o2::soa::is_type_with_originals_v<T>) { \
1904  return MetadataTrait<o2::framework::pack_head_t<typename T::originals>>::metadata::version(); \
1905  } else { \
1906  static_assert(o2::framework::always_static_assert_v<T>, "Not a versioned type"); \
1907  } \
1908  }
1909 
1910 #define DECLARE_EQUIVALENT_FOR_INDEX(_Base_, _Equiv_) \
1911  template <> \
1912  struct EquivalentIndex<_Base_, _Equiv_> { \
1913  constexpr static bool value = true; \
1914  }
1915 
1916 #define DECLARE_SOA_COLUMN_FULL(_Name_, _Getter_, _Type_, _Label_) \
1917  struct _Name_ : o2::soa::Column<_Type_, _Name_> { \
1918  static constexpr const char* mLabel = _Label_; \
1919  static_assert(!((*(mLabel + 1) == 'I' && *(mLabel + 2) == 'n' && *(mLabel + 3) == 'd' && *(mLabel + 4) == 'e' && *(mLabel + 5) == 'x')), "Index is not a valid column name"); \
1920  using base = o2::soa::Column<_Type_, _Name_>; \
1921  using type = _Type_; \
1922  using column_t = _Name_; \
1923  _Name_(arrow::ChunkedArray const* column) \
1924  : o2::soa::Column<_Type_, _Name_>(o2::soa::ColumnIterator<type>(column)) \
1925  { \
1926  } \
1927  \
1928  _Name_() = default; \
1929  _Name_(_Name_ const& other) = default; \
1930  _Name_& operator=(_Name_ const& other) = default; \
1931  \
1932  decltype(auto) _Getter_() const \
1933  { \
1934  return *mColumnIterator; \
1935  } \
1936  \
1937  decltype(auto) get() const \
1938  { \
1939  return _Getter_(); \
1940  } \
1941  }; \
1942  [[maybe_unused]] static constexpr o2::framework::expressions::BindingNode _Getter_ { _Label_, o2::framework::TypeIdHelpers::uniqueId<_Name_>(), \
1943  o2::framework::expressions::selectArrowType<_Type_>() }

1945 #define DECLARE_SOA_COLUMN(_Name_, _Getter_, _Type_) \
1946  DECLARE_SOA_COLUMN_FULL(_Name_, _Getter_, _Type_, "f" #_Name_)
1947 
1950 #define MAKEINT(_Size_) uint##_Size_##_t
1951 
1952 #define DECLARE_SOA_BITMAP_COLUMN_FULL(_Name_, _Getter_, _Size_, _Label_) \
1953  struct _Name_ : o2::soa::Column<MAKEINT(_Size_), _Name_> { \
1954  static constexpr const char* mLabel = _Label_; \
1955  static_assert(!((*(mLabel + 1) == 'I' && *(mLabel + 2) == 'n' && *(mLabel + 3) == 'd' && *(mLabel + 4) == 'e' && *(mLabel + 5) == 'x')), "Index is not a valid column name"); \
1956  using base = o2::soa::Column<MAKEINT(_Size_), _Name_>; \
1957  using type = MAKEINT(_Size_); \
1958  _Name_(arrow::ChunkedArray const* column) \
1959  : o2::soa::Column<type, _Name_>(o2::soa::ColumnIterator<type>(column)) \
1960  { \
1961  } \
1962  \
1963  _Name_() = default; \
1964  _Name_(_Name_ const& other) = default; \
1965  _Name_& operator=(_Name_ const& other) = default; \
1966  \
1967  decltype(auto) _Getter_##_raw() const \
1968  { \
1969  return *mColumnIterator; \
1970  } \
1971  \
1972  bool _Getter_##_bit(int bit) const \
1973  { \
1974  return (*mColumnIterator & (static_cast<type>(1) << bit)) >> bit; \
1975  } \
1976  }; \
1977  [[maybe_unused]] static constexpr o2::framework::expressions::BindingNode _Getter_ { _Label_, o2::framework::TypeIdHelpers::uniqueId<_Name_>(), \
1978  o2::framework::expressions::selectArrowType<MAKEINT(_Size_)>() }
1979 
1980 #define DECLARE_SOA_BITMAP_COLUMN(_Name_, _Getter_, _Size_) \
1981  DECLARE_SOA_BITMAP_COLUMN_FULL(_Name_, _Getter_, _Size_, "f" #_Name_)

1986  struct _Name_ : o2::soa::Column<_Type_, _Name_> { \
1987  static constexpr const char* mLabel = _Label_; \
1988  using base = o2::soa::Column<_Type_, _Name_>; \
1989  using type = _Type_; \
1990  using column_t = _Name_; \
1991  using spawnable_t = std::true_type; \
1992  _Name_(arrow::ChunkedArray const* column) \
1993  : o2::soa::Column<_Type_, _Name_>(o2::soa::ColumnIterator<type>(column)) \
1994  { \
1995  } \
1996  \
1997  _Name_() = default; \
1998  _Name_(_Name_ const& other) = default; \
1999  _Name_& operator=(_Name_ const& other) = default; \
2000  \
2001  decltype(auto) _Getter_() const \
2002  { \
2003  return *mColumnIterator; \
2004  } \
2005  static o2::framework::expressions::Projector Projector() \
2006  { \
2007  return _Expression_; \
2008  } \
2009  }; \
2010  [[maybe_unused]] static constexpr o2::framework::expressions::BindingNode _Getter_ { _Label_, o2::framework::TypeIdHelpers::uniqueId<_Name_>(), \
2011  o2::framework::expressions::selectArrowType<_Type_>() }

2036 #define DECLARE_SOA_SLICE_INDEX_COLUMN_FULL(_Name_, _Getter_, _Type_, _Table_, _Suffix_) \
2037  struct _Name_##IdSlice : o2::soa::Column<_Type_[2], _Name_##IdSlice> { \
2038  static_assert(std::is_integral_v<_Type_>, "Index type must be integral"); \
2039  static_assert((*_Suffix_ == '\0') || (*_Suffix_ == '_'), "Suffix has to begin with _"); \
2040  static constexpr const char* mLabel = "fIndexSlice" #_Table_ _Suffix_; \
2041  using base = o2::soa::Column<_Type_[2], _Name_##IdSlice>; \
2042  using type = _Type_[2]; \
2043  using column_t = _Name_##IdSlice; \
2044  using binding_t = _Table_; \
2045  _Name_##IdSlice(arrow::ChunkedArray const* column) \
2046  : o2::soa::Column<_Type_[2], _Name_##IdSlice>(o2::soa::ColumnIterator<type>(column)) \
2047  { \
2048  } \
2049  \
2050  _Name_##IdSlice() = default; \
2051  _Name_##IdSlice(_Name_##IdSlice const& other) = default; \
2052  _Name_##IdSlice& operator=(_Name_##IdSlice const& other) = default; \
2053  std::array<_Type_, 2> inline getIds() const \
2054  { \
2055  return _Getter_##Ids(); \
2056  } \
2057  \
2058  bool has_##_Getter_() const \
2059  { \
2060  auto a = *mColumnIterator; \
2061  return a[0] >= 0 && a[1] >= 0; \
2062  } \
2063  \
2064  std::array<_Type_, 2> _Getter_##Ids() const \
2065  { \
2066  auto a = *mColumnIterator; \
2067  return std::array{a[0], a[1]}; \
2068  } \
2069  \
2070  template <typename T> \
2071  auto _Getter_##_as() const \
2072  { \
2073  if (O2_BUILTIN_UNLIKELY(mBinding.ptr == nullptr)) { \
2074  o2::soa::notBoundTable(#_Table_); \
2075  } \
2076  auto t = mBinding.get<T>(); \
2077  if (O2_BUILTIN_UNLIKELY(t == nullptr)) { \
2078  o2::soa::dereferenceWithWrongType(); \
2079  } \
2080  if (O2_BUILTIN_UNLIKELY(!has_##_Getter_())) { \
2081  return t->emptySlice(); \
2082  } \
2083  auto a = *mColumnIterator; \
2084  auto r = t->rawSlice(a[0], a[1]); \
2085  t->copyIndexBindings(r); \
2086  r.bindInternalIndicesTo(t); \
2087  return r; \
2088  } \
2089  \
2090  auto _Getter_() const \
2091  { \
2092  return _Getter_##_as<binding_t>(); \
2093  } \
2094  \
2095  template <typename T> \
2096  bool setCurrent(T const* current) \
2097  { \
2098  if constexpr (o2::soa::is_binding_compatible_v<T, binding_t>()) { \
2099  assert(current != nullptr); \
2100  this->mBinding.bind(current); \
2101  return true; \
2102  } \
2103  return false; \
2104  } \
2105  \
2106  bool setCurrentRaw(o2::soa::Binding current) \
2107  { \
2108  this->mBinding = current; \
2109  return true; \
2110  } \
2111  binding_t const* getCurrent() const { return mBinding.get<binding_t>(); } \
2112  o2::soa::Binding getCurrentRaw() const { return mBinding; } \
2113  o2::soa::Binding mBinding; \
2114  };
2115

2119 #define DECLARE_SOA_ARRAY_INDEX_COLUMN_FULL(_Name_, _Getter_, _Type_, _Table_, _Suffix_) \
2120  struct _Name_##Ids : o2::soa::Column<std::vector<_Type_>, _Name_##Ids> { \
2121  static_assert(std::is_integral_v<_Type_>, "Index type must be integral"); \
2122  static_assert((*_Suffix_ == '\0') || (*_Suffix_ == '_'), "Suffix has to begin with _"); \
2123  static constexpr const char* mLabel = "fIndexArray" #_Table_ _Suffix_; \
2124  using base = o2::soa::Column<std::vector<_Type_>, _Name_##Ids>; \
2125  using type = std::vector<_Type_>; \
2126  using column_t = _Name_##Ids; \
2127  using binding_t = _Table_; \
2128  _Name_##Ids(arrow::ChunkedArray const* column) \
2129  : o2::soa::Column<std::vector<_Type_>, _Name_##Ids>(o2::soa::ColumnIterator<type>(column)) \
2130  { \
2131  } \
2132  \
2133  _Name_##Ids() = default; \
2134  _Name_##Ids(_Name_##Ids const& other) = default; \
2135  _Name_##Ids& operator=(_Name_##Ids const& other) = default; \
2136  \
2137  gsl::span<const _Type_> inline getIds() const \
2138  { \
2139  return _Getter_##Ids(); \
2140  } \
2141  \
2142  gsl::span<const _Type_> _Getter_##Ids() const \
2143  { \
2144  return *mColumnIterator; \
2145  } \
2146  \
2147  bool has_##_Getter_() const \
2148  { \
2149  return !(*mColumnIterator).empty(); \
2150  } \
2151  \
2152  template <typename T> \
2153  auto _Getter_##_as() const \
2154  { \
2155  if (O2_BUILTIN_UNLIKELY(mBinding.ptr == nullptr)) { \
2156  o2::soa::notBoundTable(#_Table_); \
2157  } \
2158  auto t = mBinding.get<T>(); \
2159  if (O2_BUILTIN_UNLIKELY(t == nullptr)) { \
2160  o2::soa::dereferenceWithWrongType(); \
2161  } \
2162  return getIterators<T>(); \
2163  } \
2164  \
2165  template <typename T> \
2166  auto filtered_##_Getter_##_as() const \
2167  { \
2168  if (O2_BUILTIN_UNLIKELY(mBinding.ptr == nullptr)) { \
2169  o2::soa::notBoundTable(#_Table_); \
2170  } \
2171  auto t = mBinding.get<T>(); \
2172  if (O2_BUILTIN_UNLIKELY(t == nullptr)) { \
2173  o2::soa::dereferenceWithWrongType(); \
2174  } \
2175  return getFilteredIterators<T>(); \
2176  } \
2177  \
2178  template <typename T> \
2179  auto getIterators() const \
2180  { \
2181  auto result = std::vector<typename T::unfiltered_iterator>(); \
2182  for (auto& i : *mColumnIterator) { \
2183  result.push_back(mBinding.get<T>()->rawIteratorAt(i)); \
2184  } \
2185  return result; \
2186  } \
2187  \
2188  template <typename T> \
2189  std::vector<typename T::iterator> getFilteredIterators() const \
2190  { \
2191  if constexpr (o2::soa::is_soa_filtered_v<T>) { \
2192  auto result = std::vector<typename T::iterator>(); \
2193  for (auto const& i : *mColumnIterator) { \
2194  auto pos = mBinding.get<T>()->isInSelectedRows(i); \
2195  if (pos > 0) { \
2196  result.push_back(mBinding.get<T>()->iteratorAt(pos)); \
2197  } \
2198  } \
2199  return result; \
2200  } else { \
2201  static_assert(o2::framework::always_static_assert_v<T>, "T is not a Filtered type"); \
2202  } \
2203  return {}; \
2204  } \
2205  \
2206  auto _Getter_() const \
2207  { \
2208  return _Getter_##_as<binding_t>(); \
2209  } \
2210  \
2211  template <typename T> \
2212  auto _Getter_##_first_as() const \
2213  { \
2214  if (O2_BUILTIN_UNLIKELY(mBinding.ptr == nullptr)) { \
2215  o2::soa::notBoundTable(#_Table_); \
2216  } \
2217  auto t = mBinding.get<T>(); \
2218  if (O2_BUILTIN_UNLIKELY(t == nullptr)) { \
2219  o2::soa::dereferenceWithWrongType(); \
2220  } \
2221  return t->rawIteratorAt((*mColumnIterator)[0]); \
2222  } \
2223  \
2224  template <typename T> \
2225  auto _Getter_##_last_as() const \
2226  { \
2227  if (O2_BUILTIN_UNLIKELY(mBinding.ptr == nullptr)) { \
2228  o2::soa::notBoundTable(#_Table_); \
2229  } \
2230  auto t = mBinding.get<T>(); \
2231  if (O2_BUILTIN_UNLIKELY(t == nullptr)) { \
2232  o2::soa::dereferenceWithWrongType(); \
2233  } \
2234  return t->rawIteratorAt((*mColumnIterator).back()); \
2235  } \
2236  \
2237  auto _Getter_first() const \
2238  { \
2239  return _Getter_##_first_as<binding_t>(); \
2240  } \
2241  \
2242  auto _Getter_last() const \
2243  { \
2244  return _Getter_##_last_as<binding_t>(); \
2245  } \
2246  \
2247  template <typename T> \
2248  bool setCurrent(T const* current) \
2249  { \
2250  if constexpr (o2::soa::is_binding_compatible_v<T, binding_t>()) { \
2251  assert(current != nullptr); \
2252  this->mBinding.bind(current); \
2253  return true; \
2254  } \
2255  return false; \
2256  } \
2257  \
2258  bool setCurrentRaw(o2::soa::Binding current) \
2259  { \
2260  this->mBinding = current; \
2261  return true; \
2262  } \
2263  binding_t const* getCurrent() const { return mBinding.get<binding_t>(); } \
2264  o2::soa::Binding getCurrentRaw() const { return mBinding; } \
2265  o2::soa::Binding mBinding; \
2266  };

2289  { \

2291  } \
2292  \

2294  { \

2296  } \
2297  \

2299  { \
2300  return *mColumnIterator >= 0; \
2301  } \
2302  \
2303  template <typename T> \
2304  auto _Getter_##_as() const \
2305  { \

2308  } \

2318  \
2319  auto _Getter_() const \
2320  { \

2322  } \
2323  \
2324  template <typename T> \
2325  bool setCurrent(T* current) \
2326  { \
2327  if constexpr (o2::soa::is_binding_compatible_v<T, binding_t>()) { \
2328  assert(current != nullptr); \
2329  this->mBinding.bind(current); \

2331  } \
2332  return false; \
2333  } \
2334  \

2336  { \
2337  this->mBinding = current; \
2338  return true; \
2339  } \
2340  binding_t const* getCurrent() const { return mBinding.get<binding_t>(); } \
2341  o2::soa::Binding getCurrentRaw() const { return mBinding; } \
2342  o2::soa::Binding mBinding; \
2343  }; \

2469  struct _Name_##Ids : o2::soa::Column<std::vector<_Type_>, _Name_##Ids> { \

2471  static constexpr const char* mLabel = "fIndexArray" _Label_; \
