2484  gsl::span<const _Type_> inline getIds() const \
2485  { \
2486  return _Getter_##Ids(); \
2487  } \
2488  \
2489  gsl::span<const _Type_> _Getter_##Ids() const \
2490  { \
2491  return *mColumnIterator; \
2492  } \
2493  \
2494  bool has_##_Getter_() const \
2495  { \
2496  return !(*mColumnIterator).empty(); \
2497  } \
2498  \
2499  template <typename T> \
2500  auto _Getter_##_as() const \
2501  { \
2502  auto t = mBinding.get<T>(); \
2503  if (O2_BUILTIN_UNLIKELY(t == nullptr)) { \
2504  o2::soa::dereferenceWithWrongType(); \
2505  } \
2506  return getIterators<T>(); \
2507  } \
2508  \
2509  template <typename T> \
2510  auto getIterators() const \
2511  { \
2512  auto result = std::vector<typename T::unfiltered_iterator>(); \
2513  for (auto& i : *mColumnIterator) { \
2514  result.push_back(mBinding.get<T>()->rawIteratorAt(i)); \
2515  } \
2516  return result; \
2517  } \
2518  \
2519  template <typename T> \
2520  auto _Getter_##_first_as() const \
2521  { \
2522  return mBinding.get<T>()->rawIteratorAt((*mColumnIterator)[0]); \
2523  } \
2524  \
2525  template <typename T> \
2526  auto _Getter_##_last_as() const \
2527  { \
2528  return mBinding.get<T>()->rawIteratorAt((*mColumnIterator).back()); \
2529  } \
2530  \
2531  bool setCurrentRaw(o2::soa::Binding current) \
2532  { \
2533  this->mBinding = current; \
2534  return true; \
2535  } \
2536  o2::soa::Binding getCurrentRaw() const { return mBinding; } \
2537  o2::soa::Binding mBinding; \
2538  };
2539 
2540 #define DECLARE_SOA_SELF_ARRAY_INDEX_COLUMN(_Name_, _Getter_) DECLARE_SOA_SELF_ARRAY_INDEX_COLUMN_FULL(_Name_, _Getter_, int32_t, "_" #_Name_)
2541 
2570 #define DECLARE_SOA_DYNAMIC_COLUMN(_Name_, _Getter_, ...) \
2571  struct _Name_##Callback { \
2572  static inline constexpr auto getLambda() { return __VA_ARGS__; } \
2573  }; \
2574  \
2575  struct _Name_##Helper { \
2576  using callable_t = decltype(o2::framework::FunctionMetadata(std::declval<decltype(_Name_##Callback::getLambda())>())); \
2577  using return_type = typename callable_t::return_type; \
2578  }; \
2579  template <typename... Bindings> \
2580  struct _Name_ : o2::soa::DynamicColumn<typename _Name_##Helper::callable_t::type, _Name_<Bindings...>> { \
2581  using base = o2::soa::DynamicColumn<typename _Name_##Helper::callable_t::type, _Name_<Bindings...>>; \
2582  using helper = _Name_##Helper; \
2583  using callback_holder_t = _Name_##Callback; \
2584  using callable_t = helper::callable_t; \
2585  using callback_t = callable_t::type; \
2586  \
2587  _Name_(arrow::ChunkedArray const*) \
2588  { \
2589  } \
2590  _Name_() = default; \
2591  _Name_(_Name_ const& other) = default; \
2592  _Name_& operator=(_Name_ const& other) = default; \
2593  static constexpr const char* mLabel = #_Name_; \
2594  using type = typename callable_t::return_type; \
2595  \
2596  template <typename... FreeArgs> \
2597  type _Getter_(FreeArgs... freeArgs) const \
2598  { \
2599  return boundGetter(std::make_index_sequence<std::tuple_size_v<decltype(boundIterators)>>{}, freeArgs...); \
2600  } \
2601  template <typename... FreeArgs> \
2602  type getDynamicValue(FreeArgs... freeArgs) const \
2603  { \
2604  return boundGetter(std::make_index_sequence<std::tuple_size_v<decltype(boundIterators)>>{}, freeArgs...); \
2605  } \
2606  \
2607  type get() const \
2608  { \
2609  return _Getter_(); \
2610  } \
2611  \
2612  template <size_t... Is, typename... FreeArgs> \
2613  type boundGetter(std::integer_sequence<size_t, Is...>&&, FreeArgs... freeArgs) const \
2614  { \
2615  return __VA_ARGS__((**std::get<Is>(boundIterators))..., freeArgs...); \
2616  } \
2617  \
2618  using bindings_t = typename o2::framework::pack<Bindings...>; \
2619  std::tuple<o2::soa::ColumnIterator<typename Bindings::type> const*...> boundIterators; \
2620  }
2621 
2622 #define DECLARE_SOA_TABLE_FULL_VERSIONED(_Name_, _Label_, _Origin_, _Description_, _Version_, ...) \
2623  using _Name_ = o2::soa::Table<__VA_ARGS__>; \
2624  \
2625  struct _Name_##Metadata : o2::soa::TableMetadata<_Name_##Metadata> { \
2626  using table_t = _Name_; \
2627  static constexpr o2::header::DataHeader::SubSpecificationType mVersion = _Version_; \
2628  static constexpr char const* mLabel = _Label_; \
2629  static constexpr char const mOrigin[5] = _Origin_; \
2630  static constexpr char const mDescription[16] = _Description_; \
2631  }; \
2632  \
2633  template <> \
2634  struct MetadataTrait<_Name_> { \
2635  using metadata = _Name_##Metadata; \
2636  }; \
2637  \
2638  template <> \
2639  struct MetadataTrait<_Name_::unfiltered_iterator> { \
2640  using metadata = _Name_##Metadata; \
2641  };
2642 
2643 #define DECLARE_SOA_TABLE_FULL(_Name_, _Label_, _Origin_, _Description_, ...) \
2644  DECLARE_SOA_TABLE_FULL_VERSIONED(_Name_, _Label_, _Origin_, _Description_, 0, __VA_ARGS__);
2645 #define DECLARE_SOA_TABLE(_Name_, _Origin_, _Description_, ...) \
2646  DECLARE_SOA_TABLE_FULL(_Name_, #_Name_, _Origin_, _Description_, __VA_ARGS__);
2647 #define DECLARE_SOA_TABLE_VERSIONED(_Name_, _Origin_, _Description_, _Version_, ...) \
2648  DECLARE_SOA_TABLE_FULL_VERSIONED(_Name_, #_Name_, _Origin_, _Description_, _Version_, __VA_ARGS__);
2649 
2650 #define DECLARE_SOA_EXTENDED_TABLE_FULL(_Name_, _Table_, _Origin_, _Description_, ...) \
2651  struct _Name_##Extension : o2::soa::Table<__VA_ARGS__> { \
2652  using base_t = o2::soa::Table<__VA_ARGS__>; \
2653  _Name_##Extension(std::shared_ptr<arrow::Table> table, uint64_t offset = 0) : o2::soa::Table<__VA_ARGS__>(table, offset){}; \
2654  _Name_##Extension(_Name_##Extension const&) = default; \
2655  _Name_##Extension(_Name_##Extension&&) = default; \
2656  using expression_pack_t = framework::pack<__VA_ARGS__>; \
2657  using iterator = typename base_t::template RowView<_Name_##Extension, _Name_##Extension>; \
2658  using const_iterator = iterator; \
2659  }; \
2660  using _Name_ = o2::soa::Join<_Name_##Extension, _Table_>; \
2661  \
2662  struct _Name_##ExtensionMetadata : o2::soa::TableMetadata<_Name_##ExtensionMetadata> { \
2663  using table_t = _Name_##Extension; \
2664  using base_table_t = _Table_; \
2665  using expression_pack_t = typename _Name_##Extension::expression_pack_t; \
2666  using originals = soa::originals_pack_t<_Table_>; \
2667  using sources = originals; \
2668  static constexpr o2::header::DataHeader::SubSpecificationType mVersion = getVersion<_Table_>(); \
2669  static constexpr char const* mLabel = #_Name_ "Extension"; \
2670  static constexpr char const mOrigin[5] = _Origin_; \
2671  static constexpr char const mDescription[16] = _Description_; \
2672  }; \
2673  \
2674  template <> \
2675  struct MetadataTrait<_Name_##Extension> { \
2676  using metadata = _Name_##ExtensionMetadata; \
2677  };
2678 
2679 #define DECLARE_SOA_EXTENDED_TABLE(_Name_, _Table_, _Description_, ...) \
2680  DECLARE_SOA_EXTENDED_TABLE_FULL(_Name_, _Table_, "DYN", _Description_, __VA_ARGS__)
2681 
2682 #define DECLARE_SOA_EXTENDED_TABLE_USER(_Name_, _Table_, _Description_, ...) \
2683  DECLARE_SOA_EXTENDED_TABLE_FULL(_Name_, _Table_, "AOD", _Description_, __VA_ARGS__)
2684 
2685 #define DECLARE_SOA_INDEX_TABLE_FULL(_Name_, _Key_, _Origin_, _Description_, _Exclusive_, ...) \
2686  struct _Name_ : o2::soa::IndexTable<_Key_, __VA_ARGS__> { \
2687  _Name_(std::shared_ptr<arrow::Table> table, uint64_t offset = 0) : o2::soa::IndexTable<_Key_, __VA_ARGS__>(table, offset){}; \
2688  _Name_(_Name_ const&) = default; \
2689  _Name_(_Name_&&) = default; \
2690  using iterator = typename base_t::template RowView<_Name_, _Name_>; \
2691  using const_iterator = iterator; \
2692  }; \
2693  \
2694  struct _Name_##Metadata : o2::soa::TableMetadata<_Name_##Metadata> { \
2695  using Key = _Key_; \
2696  using index_pack_t = framework::pack<__VA_ARGS__>; \
2697  using originals = decltype(soa::extractBindings(index_pack_t{})); \
2698  using sources = typename _Name_::sources_t; \
2699  static constexpr o2::header::DataHeader::SubSpecificationType mVersion = 0; \
2700  static constexpr char const* mLabel = #_Name_; \
2701  static constexpr char const mOrigin[5] = _Origin_; \
2702  static constexpr char const mDescription[16] = _Description_; \
2703  static constexpr bool exclusive = _Exclusive_; \
2704  }; \
2705  \
2706  template <> \
2707  struct MetadataTrait<_Name_> { \
2708  using metadata = _Name_##Metadata; \
2709  }; \
2710  \
2711  template <> \
2712  struct MetadataTrait<_Name_::iterator> { \
2713  using metadata = _Name_##Metadata; \
2714  };
2715 
2716 #define DECLARE_SOA_INDEX_TABLE(_Name_, _Key_, _Description_, ...) \
2717  DECLARE_SOA_INDEX_TABLE_FULL(_Name_, _Key_, "IDX", _Description_, false, __VA_ARGS__)
2718 
2719 #define DECLARE_SOA_INDEX_TABLE_EXCLUSIVE(_Name_, _Key_, _Description_, ...) \
2720  DECLARE_SOA_INDEX_TABLE_FULL(_Name_, _Key_, "IDX", _Description_, true, __VA_ARGS__)
2721 
2722 #define DECLARE_SOA_INDEX_TABLE_USER(_Name_, _Key_, _Description_, ...) \
2723  DECLARE_SOA_INDEX_TABLE_FULL(_Name_, _Key_, "AOD", _Description_, false, __VA_ARGS__)
2724 
2725 #define DECLARE_SOA_INDEX_TABLE_EXCLUSIVE_USER(_Name_, _Key_, _Description_, ...) \
2726  DECLARE_SOA_INDEX_TABLE_FULL(_Name_, _Key_, "AOD", _Description_, true, __VA_ARGS__)
2727 
2728 namespace o2::soa
2729 {
2730 template <typename T>
2731 class FilteredBase;
2732 
2733 template <typename... Ts>
2734 struct Join : TableWrap<Ts...>::table_t {
2735  using base = typename TableWrap<Ts...>::table_t;
2736  using originals = originals_pack_t<Ts...>;
2737 
2738  Join(std::vector<std::shared_ptr<arrow::Table>>&& tables, uint64_t offset = 0)
2739  : base{ArrowHelpers::joinTables(std::move(tables)), offset}
2740  {
2741  bindInternalIndicesTo(this);
2742  }
2743  using base::bindExternalIndices;
2744  using base::bindInternalIndicesTo;
2745 
2746  using self_t = Join<Ts...>;
2747  using table_t = base;
2748  using persistent_columns_t = typename table_t::persistent_columns_t;
2749  using iterator = decltype([]<typename... Os>(framework::pack<Os...>) { return typename table_t::template RowView<Join<Ts...>, Os...>{}; }(originals{}));
2750  using const_iterator = iterator;
2751  using unfiltered_iterator = iterator;
2752  using unfiltered_const_iterator = const_iterator;
2753  using filtered_iterator = decltype([]<typename... Os>(framework::pack<Os...>) { return typename table_t::template RowViewFiltered<Filtered<Join<Ts...>>, Os...>{}; }(originals{}));
2754  using filtered_const_iterator = filtered_iterator;
2755 
2756  iterator begin()
2757  {
2758  return iterator{this->cached_begin()};
2759  }
2760 
2761  const_iterator begin() const
2762  {
2763  return const_iterator{this->cached_begin()};
2764  }
2765 
2766  auto sliceByCached(framework::expressions::BindingNode const& node, int value, o2::framework::SliceCache& cache) const
2767  {
2768  return doSliceByCached(this, node, value, cache);
2769  }
2770 
2771  auto sliceByCachedUnsorted(framework::expressions::BindingNode const& node, int value, o2::framework::SliceCache& cache) const
2772  {
2773  return doSliceByCachedUnsorted(this, node, value, cache);
2774  }
2775 
2776  template <typename T1, bool OPT, bool SORTED>
2777  auto sliceBy(o2::framework::PresliceBase<T1, OPT, SORTED> const& container, int value) const
2778  {
2779  return doSliceBy(this, container, value);
2780  }
2781 
2782  iterator rawIteratorAt(uint64_t i) const
2783  {
2784  auto it = iterator{this->cached_begin()};
2785  it.setCursor(i);
2786  return it;
2787  }
2788 
2789  iterator iteratorAt(uint64_t i) const
2790  {
2791  return rawIteratorAt(i);
2792  }
2793 
2794  auto rawSlice(uint64_t start, uint64_t end) const
2795  {
2796  return self_t{{this->asArrowTable()->Slice(start, end - start + 1)}, start};
2797  }
2798 
2799  auto emptySlice() const
2800  {
2801  return self_t{{this->asArrowTable()->Slice(0, 0)}, 0};
2802  }
2803 
2804  template <typename T>
2805  static consteval bool contains()
2806  {
2807  if constexpr (is_type_with_originals_v<T>) {
2808  return contains(typename T::originals{});
2809  } else {
2810  return framework::has_type<T>(originals{});
2811  }
2812  }
2813 
2814  template <typename... TTs>
2815  static constexpr bool contains(framework::pack<TTs...>)
2816  {
2817  return (contains<TTs>() || ...);
2818  }
2819 };
2820 
2821 template <typename T1, typename T2>
2822 struct Concat : ConcatBase<T1, T2> {
2823  Concat(std::shared_ptr<arrow::Table> t1, std::shared_ptr<arrow::Table> t2, uint64_t offset = 0)
2824  : ConcatBase<T1, T2>{ArrowHelpers::concatTables({t1, t2}), offset}
2825  {
2826  bindInternalIndicesTo(this);
2827  }
2828  Concat(std::vector<std::shared_ptr<arrow::Table>> tables, uint64_t offset = 0)
2829  : ConcatBase<T1, T2>{ArrowHelpers::concatTables(std::move(tables)), offset}
2830  {
2831  bindInternalIndicesTo(this);
2832  }
2833 
2834  using base = ConcatBase<T1, T2>;
2835  using originals = framework::concatenated_pack_t<originals_pack_t<T1>, originals_pack_t<T2>>;
2836 
2837  using base::bindExternalIndices;
2838  using base::bindInternalIndicesTo;
2839 
2840  // FIXME: can be remove when we do the same treatment we did for Join to Concatenate
2841  using left_t = T1;
2842  using right_t = T2;
2843  using table_t = ConcatBase<T1, T2>;
2844  using persistent_columns_t = typename table_t::persistent_columns_t;
2845 
2846  using iterator = typename table_t::template RowView<Concat<T1, T2>, T1, T2>;
2847  using filtered_iterator = typename table_t::template RowViewFiltered<Concat<T1, T2>, T1, T2>;
2848 };
2849 
2850 template <typename T>
2851 using is_soa_join_t = framework::is_specialization<T, soa::Join>;
2852 
2853 template <typename T>
2854 using is_soa_concat_t = framework::is_specialization<T, soa::Concat>;
2855 
2856 template <typename T>
2857 inline constexpr bool is_soa_join_v = is_soa_join_t<T>::value;
2858 
2859 template <typename T>
2860 inline constexpr bool is_soa_concat_v = is_soa_concat_t<T>::value;
2861 
2862 template <typename T>
2863 class FilteredBase : public T
2864 {
2865  public:
2866  using self_t = FilteredBase<T>;
2867  using originals = originals_pack_t<T>;
2868  using table_t = typename T::table_t;
2869  using persistent_columns_t = typename T::persistent_columns_t;
2870  using external_index_columns_t = typename T::external_index_columns_t;
2871 
2872  using iterator = decltype([]<typename... Os>(framework::pack<Os...>) { return typename table_t::template RowViewFiltered<FilteredBase<T>, Os...>{}; }(originals{}));
2873  using unfiltered_iterator = decltype([]<typename... Os>(framework::pack<Os...>) { return typename table_t::template RowView<FilteredBase<T>, Os...>{}; }(originals{}));
2874  using const_iterator = iterator;
2875 
2876  FilteredBase(std::vector<std::shared_ptr<arrow::Table>>&& tables, gandiva::Selection const& selection, uint64_t offset = 0)
2877  : T{std::move(tables), offset},
2878  mSelectedRows{getSpan(selection)}
2879  {
2880  if (this->tableSize() != 0) {
2881  mFilteredBegin = table_t::filtered_begin(mSelectedRows);
2882  }
2883  resetRanges();
2884  mFilteredBegin.bindInternalIndices(this);
2885  }
2886 
2887  FilteredBase(std::vector<std::shared_ptr<arrow::Table>>&& tables, SelectionVector&& selection, uint64_t offset = 0)
2888  : T{std::move(tables), offset},
2889  mSelectedRowsCache{std::move(selection)},
2890  mCached{true}
2891  {
2892  mSelectedRows = gsl::span{mSelectedRowsCache};
2893  if (this->tableSize() != 0) {
2894  mFilteredBegin = table_t::filtered_begin(mSelectedRows);
2895  }
2896  resetRanges();
2897  mFilteredBegin.bindInternalIndices(this);
2898  }
2899 
2900  FilteredBase(std::vector<std::shared_ptr<arrow::Table>>&& tables, gsl::span<int64_t const> const& selection, uint64_t offset = 0)
2901  : T{std::move(tables), offset},
2902  mSelectedRows{selection}
2903  {
2904  if (this->tableSize() != 0) {
2905  mFilteredBegin = table_t::filtered_begin(mSelectedRows);
2906  }
2907  resetRanges();
2908  mFilteredBegin.bindInternalIndices(this);
2909  }
2910 
2911  iterator begin()
2912  {
2913  return iterator(mFilteredBegin);
2914  }
2915 
2916  const_iterator begin() const
2917  {
2918  return const_iterator(mFilteredBegin);
2919  }
2920 
2921  unfiltered_iterator rawIteratorAt(uint64_t i) const
2922  {
2923  auto it = unfiltered_iterator{mFilteredBegin};
2924  it.setCursor(i);
2925  return it;
2926  }
2927 
2928  [[nodiscard]] RowViewSentinel end() const
2929  {
2930  return RowViewSentinel{*mFilteredEnd};
2931  }
2932 
2933  auto& cached_begin()
2934  {
2935  return mFilteredBegin;
2936  }
2937 
2938  auto const& cached_begin() const
2939  {
2940  return mFilteredBegin;
2941  }
2942 
2943  iterator iteratorAt(uint64_t i) const
2944  {
2945  return mFilteredBegin + i;
2946  }
2947 
2948  [[nodiscard]] int64_t size() const
2949  {
2950  return mSelectedRows.size();
2951  }
2952 
2953  [[nodiscard]] int64_t tableSize() const
2954  {
2955  return table_t::asArrowTable()->num_rows();
2956  }
2957 
2958  auto const& getSelectedRows() const
2959  {
2960  return mSelectedRows;
2961  }
2962 
2963  auto rawSlice(uint64_t start, uint64_t end) const
2964  {
2965  SelectionVector newSelection;
2966  newSelection.resize(static_cast<int64_t>(end - start + 1));
2967  std::iota(newSelection.begin(), newSelection.end(), start);
2968  return self_t{{this->asArrowTable()}, std::move(newSelection), 0};
2969  }
2970 
2971  auto emptySlice() const
2972  {
2973  return self_t{{this->asArrowTable()}, SelectionVector{}, 0};
2974  }
2975 
2976  static inline auto getSpan(gandiva::Selection const& sel)
2977  {
2978  if (sel == nullptr) {
2979  return gsl::span<int64_t const>{};
2980  }
2981  auto array = std::static_pointer_cast<arrow::Int64Array>(sel->ToArray());
2982  auto start = array->raw_values();
2983  auto stop = start + array->length();
2984  return gsl::span{start, stop};
2985  }
2986 
2989  template <typename... TA>
2990  void bindExternalIndices(TA*... current)
2991  {
2992  table_t::bindExternalIndices(current...);
2993  mFilteredBegin.bindExternalIndices(current...);
2994  }
2995 
2996  void bindExternalIndicesRaw(std::vector<o2::soa::Binding>&& ptrs)
2997  {
2998  mFilteredBegin.bindExternalIndicesRaw(std::forward<std::vector<o2::soa::Binding>>(ptrs));
2999  }
3000 
3001  template <typename I>
3002  void bindInternalIndicesTo(I const* ptr)
3003  {
3004  mFilteredBegin.bindInternalIndices(ptr);
3005  }
3006 
3007  template <typename T1, typename... Cs>
3008  void doCopyIndexBindings(framework::pack<Cs...>, T1& dest) const
3009  {
3010  dest.bindExternalIndicesRaw(mFilteredBegin.getIndexBindings());
3011  }
3012 
3013  template <typename T1>
3014  void copyIndexBindings(T1& dest) const
3015  {
3016  doCopyIndexBindings(external_index_columns_t{}, dest);
3017  }
3018 
3019  template <typename T1>
3020  auto rawSliceBy(o2::framework::Preslice<T1> const& container, int value) const
3021  {
3022  return (table_t)this->sliceBy(container, value);
3023  }
3024 
3025  auto sliceByCached(framework::expressions::BindingNode const& node, int value, o2::framework::SliceCache& cache) const
3026  {
3027  return doFilteredSliceByCached(this, node, value, cache);
3028  }
3029 
3030  auto sliceByCachedUnsorted(framework::expressions::BindingNode const& node, int value, o2::framework::SliceCache& cache) const
3031  {
3032  return doSliceByCachedUnsorted(this, node, value, cache);
3033  }
3034 
3035  template <typename T1, bool OPT, bool SORTED>
3036  auto sliceBy(o2::framework::PresliceBase<T1, OPT, SORTED> const& container, int value) const
3037  {
3038  if constexpr (SORTED) {
3039  return doFilteredSliceBy(this, container, value);
3040  } else {
3041  return doSliceBy(this, container, value);
3042  }
3043  }
3044 
3045  auto select(framework::expressions::Filter const& f) const
3046  {
3047  auto t = o2::soa::select(*this, f);
3048  copyIndexBindings(t);
3049  return t;
3050  }
3051 
3052  int isInSelectedRows(int i) const
3053  {
3054  auto locate = std::find(mSelectedRows.begin(), mSelectedRows.end(), i);
3055  if (locate == mSelectedRows.end()) {
3056  return -1;
3057  }
3058  return static_cast<int>(std::distance(mSelectedRows.begin(), locate));
3059  }
3060 
3061  void sumWithSelection(SelectionVector const& selection)
3062  {
3063  mCached = true;
3064  SelectionVector rowsUnion;
3065  std::set_union(mSelectedRows.begin(), mSelectedRows.end(), selection.begin(), selection.end(), std::back_inserter(rowsUnion));
3066  mSelectedRowsCache.clear();
3067  mSelectedRowsCache = rowsUnion;
3068  resetRanges();
3069  }
3070 
3071  void intersectWithSelection(SelectionVector const& selection)
3072  {
3073  mCached = true;
3074  SelectionVector intersection;
3075  std::set_intersection(mSelectedRows.begin(), mSelectedRows.end(), selection.begin(), selection.end(), std::back_inserter(intersection));
3076  mSelectedRowsCache.clear();
3077  mSelectedRowsCache = intersection;
3078  resetRanges();
3079  }
3080 
3081  void sumWithSelection(gsl::span<int64_t const> const& selection)
3082  {
3083  mCached = true;
3084  SelectionVector rowsUnion;
3085  std::set_union(mSelectedRows.begin(), mSelectedRows.end(), selection.begin(), selection.end(), std::back_inserter(rowsUnion));
3086  mSelectedRowsCache.clear();
3087  mSelectedRowsCache = rowsUnion;
3088  resetRanges();
3089  }
3090 
3091  void intersectWithSelection(gsl::span<int64_t const> const& selection)
3092  {
3093  mCached = true;
3094  SelectionVector intersection;
3095  std::set_intersection(mSelectedRows.begin(), mSelectedRows.end(), selection.begin(), selection.end(), std::back_inserter(intersection));
3096  mSelectedRowsCache.clear();
3097  mSelectedRowsCache = intersection;
3098  resetRanges();
3099  }
3100 
3101  bool isCached() const
3102  {
3103  return mCached;
3104  }
3105 
3106  private:
3107  void resetRanges()
3108  {
3109  if (mCached) {
3110  mSelectedRows = gsl::span{mSelectedRowsCache};
3111  }
3112  mFilteredEnd.reset(new RowViewSentinel{static_cast<int64_t>(mSelectedRows.size())});
3113  if (tableSize() == 0) {
3114  mFilteredBegin = *mFilteredEnd;
3115  } else {
3116  mFilteredBegin.resetSelection(mSelectedRows);
3117  }
3118  }
3119 
3120  gsl::span<int64_t const> mSelectedRows;
3121  SelectionVector mSelectedRowsCache;
3122  bool mCached = false;
3123  iterator mFilteredBegin;
3124  std::shared_ptr<RowViewSentinel> mFilteredEnd;
3125 };
3126 
3127 template <typename T>
3128 class Filtered : public FilteredBase<T>
3129 {
3130  public:
3131  using base_t = T;
3132  using self_t = Filtered<T>;
3133  using table_t = typename FilteredBase<T>::table_t;
3134  using originals = originals_pack_t<T>;
3135 
3136  using iterator = decltype([]<typename... Os>(framework::pack<Os...>) { return typename table_t::template RowViewFiltered<Filtered<T>, Os...>{}; }(originals{}));
3137  using unfiltered_iterator = decltype([]<typename... Os>(framework::pack<Os...>) { return typename table_t::template RowView<Filtered<T>, Os...>{}; }(originals{}));
3138  using const_iterator = iterator;
3139 
3140  iterator begin()
3141  {
3142  return iterator(this->cached_begin());
3143  }
3144 
3145  const_iterator begin() const
3146  {
3147  return const_iterator(this->cached_begin());
3148  }
3149 
3150  Filtered(std::vector<std::shared_ptr<arrow::Table>>&& tables, gandiva::Selection const& selection, uint64_t offset = 0)
3151  : FilteredBase<T>(std::move(tables), selection, offset) {}
3152 
3153  Filtered(std::vector<std::shared_ptr<arrow::Table>>&& tables, SelectionVector&& selection, uint64_t offset = 0)
3154  : FilteredBase<T>(std::move(tables), std::forward<SelectionVector>(selection), offset) {}
3155 
3156  Filtered(std::vector<std::shared_ptr<arrow::Table>>&& tables, gsl::span<int64_t const> const& selection, uint64_t offset = 0)
3157  : FilteredBase<T>(std::move(tables), selection, offset) {}
3158 
3159  Filtered<T> operator+(SelectionVector const& selection)
3160  {
3161  Filtered<T> copy(*this);
3162  copy.sumWithSelection(selection);
3163  return copy;
3164  }
3165 
3166  Filtered<T> operator+(gsl::span<int64_t const> const& selection)
3167  {
3168  Filtered<T> copy(*this);
3169  copy.sumWithSelection(selection);
3170  return copy;
3171  }
3172 
3173  Filtered<T> operator+(Filtered<T> const& other)
3174  {
3175  return operator+(other.getSelectedRows());
3176  }
3177 
3178  Filtered<T> operator+=(SelectionVector const& selection)
3179  {
3180  this->sumWithSelection(selection);
3181  return *this;
3182  }
3183 
3184  Filtered<T> operator+=(gsl::span<int64_t const> const& selection)
3185  {
3186  this->sumWithSelection(selection);
3187  return *this;
3188  }
3189 
3190  Filtered<T> operator+=(Filtered<T> const& other)
3191  {
3192  return operator+=(other.getSelectedRows());
3193  }
3194 
3195  Filtered<T> operator*(SelectionVector const& selection)
3196  {
3197  Filtered<T> copy(*this);
3198  copy.intersectWithSelection(selection);
3199  return copy;
3200  }
3201 
3202  Filtered<T> operator*(gsl::span<int64_t const> const& selection)
3203  {
3204  Filtered<T> copy(*this);
3205  copy.intersectWithSelection(selection);
3206  return copy;
3207  }
3208 
3209  Filtered<T> operator*(Filtered<T> const& other)
3210  {
3211  return operator*(other.getSelectedRows());
3212  }
3213 
3214  Filtered<T> operator*=(SelectionVector const& selection)
3215  {
3216  this->intersectWithSelection(selection);
3217  return *this;
3218  }
3219 
3220  Filtered<T> operator*=(gsl::span<int64_t const> const& selection)
3221  {
3222  this->intersectWithSelection(selection);
3223  return *this;
3224  }
3225 
3226  Filtered<T> operator*=(Filtered<T> const& other)
3227  {
3228  return operator*=(other.getSelectedRows());
3229  }
3230 
3231  unfiltered_iterator rawIteratorAt(uint64_t i) const
3232  {
3233  auto it = unfiltered_iterator{this->cached_begin()};
3234  it.setCursor(i);
3235  return it;
3236  }
3237 
3238  using FilteredBase<T>::getSelectedRows;
3239 
3240  auto rawSlice(uint64_t start, uint64_t end) const
3241  {
3242  SelectionVector newSelection;
3243  newSelection.resize(static_cast<int64_t>(end - start + 1));
3244  std::iota(newSelection.begin(), newSelection.end(), start);
3245  return self_t{{this->asArrowTable()}, std::move(newSelection), 0};
3246  }
3247 
3248  auto emptySlice() const
3249  {
3250  return self_t{{this->asArrowTable()}, SelectionVector{}, 0};
3251  }
3252 
3253  template <typename T1>
3254  auto rawSliceBy(o2::framework::Preslice<T1> const& container, int value) const
3255  {
3256  return (table_t)this->sliceBy(container, value);
3257  }
3258 
3259  auto sliceByCached(framework::expressions::BindingNode const& node, int value, o2::framework::SliceCache& cache) const
3260  {
3261  return doFilteredSliceByCached(this, node, value, cache);
3262  }
3263 
3264  auto sliceByCachedUnsorted(framework::expressions::BindingNode const& node, int value, o2::framework::SliceCache& cache) const
3265  {
3266  return doSliceByCachedUnsorted(this, node, value, cache);
3267  }
3268 
3269  template <typename T1, bool OPT, bool SORTED>
3270  auto sliceBy(o2::framework::PresliceBase<T1, OPT, SORTED> const& container, int value) const
3271  {
3272  if constexpr (SORTED) {
3273  return doFilteredSliceBy(this, container, value);
3274  } else {
3275  return doSliceBy(this, container, value);
3276  }
3277  }
3278 
3279  auto select(framework::expressions::Filter const& f) const
3280  {
3281  auto t = o2::soa::select(*this, f);
3282  copyIndexBindings(t);
3283  return t;
3284  }
3285 };
3286

3309  Filtered(std::vector<Filtered<T>>&& tables, gandiva::Selection const& selection, uint64_t offset = 0)

3311  {
3312  for (auto& table : tables) {
3313  *this *= table;
3314  }
3315  }

3435  template <typename T1, bool OPT, bool SORTED>
3436  auto sliceBy(o2::framework::PresliceBase<T1, OPT, SORTED> const& container, int value) const
3437  {

3441  return doSliceBy(this, container, value);

3445  private:
3446  std::vector<std::shared_ptr<arrow::Table>> extractTablesFromFiltered(std::vector<Filtered<T>>& tables)
3447  {
3448  std::vector<std::shared_ptr<arrow::Table>> outTables;
3449  for (auto& table : tables) {
3450  outTables.push_back(table.asArrowTable());
3451  }
3452  return outTables;
3453  }
3454 };

3461 template <typename Key, typename H, typename... Ts>
3462 struct IndexTable : Table<soa::Index<>, H, Ts...> {
3463  using base_t = Table<soa::Index<>, H, Ts...>;
3464  using table_t = base_t;
3465  using safe_base_t = Table<H, Ts...>;
3466  using indexing_t = Key;
3467  using first_t = typename H::binding_t;
3468  using rest_t = framework::pack<typename Ts::binding_t...>;
3469  using sources_t = originals_pack_t<Key, first_t, typename Ts::binding_t...>;
3470 
3471  IndexTable(std::shared_ptr<arrow::Table> table, uint64_t offset = 0)
3472  : base_t{table, offset}
3473  {
3474  }
3475 
3476  IndexTable(IndexTable const&) = default;
3477  IndexTable(IndexTable&&) = default;
3478  IndexTable& operator=(IndexTable const&) = default;
3479  IndexTable& operator=(IndexTable&&) = default;
3480 
3481  using iterator = typename base_t::template RowView<IndexTable<Key, H, Ts...>, IndexTable<Key, H, Ts...>>;
3482  using const_iterator = iterator;
3483 };
3484 
3485 template <typename T>
3486 inline constexpr bool is_soa_index_table_v = framework::is_base_of_template_v<soa::IndexTable, T>;
3487 
3488 template <typename T, bool APPLY>
3489 struct SmallGroupsBase : public Filtered<T> {
3490  static constexpr bool applyFilters = APPLY;
3491  SmallGroupsBase(std::vector<std::shared_ptr<arrow::Table>>&& tables, gandiva::Selection const& selection, uint64_t offset = 0)
3492  : Filtered<T>(std::move(tables), selection, offset) {}
3493 
3494  SmallGroupsBase(std::vector<std::shared_ptr<arrow::Table>>&& tables, SelectionVector&& selection, uint64_t offset = 0)
3495  : Filtered<T>(std::move(tables), std::forward<SelectionVector>(selection), offset) {}
3496 
3497  SmallGroupsBase(std::vector<std::shared_ptr<arrow::Table>>&& tables, gsl::span<int64_t const> const& selection, uint64_t offset = 0)
3498  : Filtered<T>(std::move(tables), selection, offset) {}
3499 };
3500 
3501 template <typename T>
3502 using SmallGroups = SmallGroupsBase<T, true>;
3503 
3504 template <typename T>
3505 using SmallGroupsUnfiltered = SmallGroupsBase<T, false>;
3506 
3507 template <typename T>
3508 struct is_smallgroups_t {
3509  static constexpr bool value = false;
3510 };
3511 
3512 template <typename T, bool F>
3513 struct is_smallgroups_t<SmallGroupsBase<T, F>> {
3514  static constexpr bool value = true;
3515 };
3516 
3517 template <typename T>
3518 constexpr bool is_smallgroups_v = is_smallgroups_t<T>::value;
3519 } // namespace o2::soa
